5 STARS580PPFRFordhistoric cup
Renault Captur S Edition '21 - FF - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - 1.68
Mar 17, 2026
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body -Size "21 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear B - Wing AExcellent top performer at 600 PP — I'm running sport soft tires for maximum front grip and to eliminate wheel spin. No racing brakes needed; the soft compound helps deliver great brake performance, so I can add more power and top speed instead.Just check your braking points — they're a bit earlier than usual. Handling also is superior. The power curve is unique: peak power hits at 6200 rpm, so remember to shift at 6500 rpm. The very long gearbox is set for the Nordschleife, where it fits perfectly. For shorter tracks where you don't need as much top speed, increase the final drive to bring all the gears down. Make sure 6th gear still reaches 6200 rpm at the fastest point on the track you're racing. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mar 16, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide body-Size "16 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front A - Side A - Rear Standard - Wing B Great front grip and eagerness in an FF car. Very pleasant to drive on most tracks like Brands Hatch or similar ones.It delivers comparable performance to the Peugeot 208 , Honda fit or VW Polo.... With the excellent front-end grip and a very stable, predictable driving line. I avoid racing brakes , only pads—the stock brakes are already very good and more than capable. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Maserati Gran Turismo S '08 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.68
Mar 16, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Livery design: praiano63 Wide CarRims "20 - Offset wide - Rims width wide Front A - Side Standard - Wing Custom It's a lighter car than the swap version , 180 lbs less , and 70HP less too. A very few more performant than swap . This car delivers an excellent driving experience with a clear, unobstructed view from the cockpit. It feels very stable and planted. Overall performance is impressive—it comes very close to matching the absolute top 700 PP road cars, with me lapping Spa in 2:17. It performs excellently on the Nordschleife as well.Unfortunately, fuel consumption is way too high for the Le Mans event, even on fuel map 6. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mar 16, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide car Rims size "16 - Width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear A - Wing Custom Very performant car on the Tokyo event, regularly lapping 2:08–2:09 and winning by roughly 40 seconds ahead of 2nd place with a one-stop on lap 8 for fuel only. Excellent handling and front grip let you take full throttle in turn 3, with a very precise driving line that makes it easy to drive flat-out. Use normal brakes (Only pads) and remember to check your braking points — the final one is under the 200 m panel. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

Mar 9, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine Swap: Hellcat-Charger Wide Car. Rims 16" - rims width wide - Offset Standard Front B - Rear A I won't make a maxed 700 PP build for this car. There's a bug in the suspension—springs are too soft, combined with the short wheelbase (I suppose), so the racing tire grip doesn't handle weight transfer well. Top speed isn't great (probably due to the square front). Acceleration is excellent.At this 600 PP level, the car is very competitive on short, low- to medium-speed tracks—one of the best on Tsukuba. Avoid grass or high curbs. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Feb 24, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: 8.0-WR16-64V4T-Chiron -Wide body-Size "18 & "19 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom I've tested all the Corvettes with Chiron engine swaps—the '01, '19, and this '20 model. Didn't like any of them. The '20 was the best of the bunch, but I far prefer the original engine. Those chassis just can't handle the swap: too much torque (hard to put to the ground), too much weight (hard to control the transfer on these springs), and weak brakes for the same reasons. Driving feel is decent, but performance is good on Daytona or Spa! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ****** Livery design: Skullsport Wide body car.Rims size 16" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Rear St - Wing A There is a huge PP bug that allows you to carry too much power on racing tires on this car. Feb 21, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Standard wheels - Rims "17- rims width standard - Offset standard Front B - Side A - Rear St - Wing A This car has a big wheelspin problem. It's annoying to drive with higher power than this. I had to fit racing tires for a better, steadier driving line. I also added heavy ballast to handle more power and make it performant. Handling is excellent—it's very good to drive. Performance is just okay and can't compete with the top 600 PP cars (around 10 seconds slower on the Nordschleife).But it's a perfect choice for monotype races with a 600 PP limit in online lobbies! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mitsubishi GTO Twin Turbo '91 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.67
Feb 21, 2026
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Original Livery Design: Deep_Wet_Wet ENGINE SWAP: H25A-Escudo Wide Body. - Size "15 - Rims width wide - Offset wide -Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom It's a very fast car—grippy, with the front end sticking to the driving line. But you'll have to play well with your driving inputs: brakes, wheel, and off-throttle when entering a turn. The low point is the very peaky engine—no power at all in the low-to-medium RPM range. To stay in the optimum RPM range, I've set a close-ratio gearbox, but you'll have to adapt it to your track using the final gear only for optimum top speed. Performance is excellent. It’s a 5-star car, especially on the Nordschleife, where it laps under 6:30—a true benchmark for 700 PP road cars! Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: 3UZ-FE-SC430 / Lexus Gr2 Wide BodyRims '20 - Rim width St - Offset StFront B - Side St - Rear A - Wing A Normally, the main issue for this car at this level is front wheel spin out of slow and medium-speed corners. To reduce this problem almost completely, I’m using Medium tires and a rear diffuser to improve grip, along with slightly less power for this 700PP tune. Top speed is still good, and the grip is excellent. The car shows great eagerness, is easy to place, and offers superior front grip. Overall performance is solid, though not quite on par with the very top 700PP cars , about 5 seconds slower on the Nordschleife, with a lap time of 6:40. Good option or Le Mans due to low gas consumption swap engine. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Volkswagen Golf VII GTI '14 - FF - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.67
Feb 11, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Livery Design : Homelessbaby_RL -Wide body-Size "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front A - Side A - Wing A Needed some extreme settings to make this car competitive—understeer was massive. Now it's performant and super reactive to inputs. Throttle + sudden steering angle changes together induce a nice, controllable rear-end drift when entering turns. Just like most real-life FF rally cars like Renault clio kitt car in the 80's. Almost zero FF cars can pull this off in the game, and that's a huge plus. Gearbox is tuned for Nordschleife—for slower tracks, shorten it with a higher final drive. Performance is right up there with the top 550PP cars in-game, but it's not quite cracking the top 3-4 on lap times. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims Size "17 & "18 Now you can race this car alongside any top 600PP car. It's lapping around 7:06 in my hands. Avoid kerbs and grass. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body- Size "14 - Rims width wide - Offset wide-Front Standard - Wing Custom Here’s a 700PP version. With excellent performance, this 200 kg rear ballast setup makes the car drivable with superb handling. This car has huge torque, and the ballast helps contain wheelspin—together with the soft compound. It also lightens the front end, boosting grip and precision up front. Plus, it allows more power at the same 700PP.A very all-around tune, from Laguna Seca to any technical track. It’s not suitable for Le Mans due to high fuel consumption, even in Fuel Mode 6. This is the "Starsky & Hutch" car livery, from the '70s TV series I watched as a kid. The original car was a Ford Gran Torino. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** livery Design: wing-green-sky Wide Body Installed Engine SWAP: Rims Size "17 - RIm width Wide - Offset Standard siizze. Front B - Side B - Rear Standard - Wing Custom I've tested all the options: rear parts—standard diffuser, A, and B—hard or medium tires, several ballast options from 0 kg to 75 kg of rear ballast. I've spent my day on this car, but finally, I've found the sweet spot. I love this balance, grip, and engine sound; performance in terms of lap time is just good but not superior at the 700PP level. Driving pleasure is a real must. It only needs about 1.5 seconds on Spa for 5 stars. The rest is just perfect. What a car! Le Mans is doable using Fuel Mode 5 or 6 for 3 laps, lapping around 4:03. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°° The ultra-high-RPM turbo is a bit faster, but the high-RPM turbo is better for slow tracks with slow-to-medium turns. Red Bull X2019 Comp - MR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - Sardegna - 1.67
Feb 3, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Pay close attention to your braking points—they’re much later compared to normal racing cars. Use trail braking all the way to the apex; this car requires a unique driving style to maximize speed. While the top speed isn’t particularly high, avoiding damage is crucial, as it can further reduce your speed. Stay close to other cars to take advantage of the slipstream—it’s a key strategy for staying competitive. Overall, it’s a fun and rewarding way to earn some credits in this event! 2 stop for gas , no need to change tires. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

700PPGr3Le MansMRPorsche
Porsche 911 GT3 R (992) '22 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.67
Feb 2, 2026
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Just a little update: easier setup for this car. The previous one was a bit too extreme.Super versatile all-around setup — it performs great on pretty much every track and is very quick at Spa (2:06), Daytona, or the Nordschleife.I went with very stiff suspension to control weight transfer. Softer settings let the rear shift too much and cause excessive rotation (e.g., Turn 1 at Daytona). I prioritized keeping max front downforce and the best possible front grip.It's an excellent car overall — basically matches the '17 model's performance but with noticeably more grip in low- and medium-speed corners.On the 'Ring, it's all about handling kerbs and flying through those quick direction changes. You need real confidence to hold a fast, consistent rhythm and flow. With this setup, I'm lapping close to 6 minutes. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** It's a very top Gr3 under BOP, witth superior grip and good speed. I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive,><((((((°>°°°°°°

Shelby Cobra Daytona Coupé '64 - FR - 600PP - Sport Soft tires - Nordschleife - 1.66
Jan 13, 2026
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** - Size "15 / Rims width wide / Offset wide A top-tier 600PP car on Nordschleife, consistently lapping around 7:05 in my hands. This excellent old race car feels well-balanced after adding a lot of rear ballast. The ballast improves front-end eagerness and grip while also helping to control rear wheel spin by better loading the rear tires. It’s now an easy and fast car—just be mindful not to overdrive it too much.Check your braking points—the brakes are a bit weaker compared to modern cars. Be sure to brake earlier to stay in control, especially on fast tracks. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°

Mitsubishi FTO Version GP R '97 - FF - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.66
Jan 11, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 18" - rims width wide - Offset St Front B - Side A - Rear A - Wing B A top-tier 600 PP car in terms of performance, especially on the Nordschleife, where it ranks among the top 6 (no engine swap) alongside cars like the Audi TTS, Ford GT '06, Toyota Celica GT-Four '94 (itself!), Honda S660, and Lancia Delta Integrale Evo '91 — lapping in 7:07 in my hands. It’s very strong on any other track too, with great grip, excellent handling, and a steady, predictable line. Wheelspin is barely an issue — only in very slow 1st or 2nd gear corners, and even then just a little. It doesn’t upset your driving line at all. This gearbox is tuned specifically for the Nordschleife. You can shorten the ratios (using the final gear) for any slower, tighter tracks. The high-lift camshaft & titanium connecting rods push the revs very high — the engine scream is absolutely addictive! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS800PPGran TurismoMRSardegna
Gearbox settings in GT7
Jan 9, 2026
Gearbox Tuning in GT7: Key PrinciplesGearbox settings in Gran Turismo 7 (GT7) don't make a huge difference overall—they're mainly beneficial for peaky engines (those with narrow power bands).Step 1: Choose Your Start TypeFirst, decide if your setup is for a standing start (e.g., drag races) or a rolling start (e.g., most circuit races).Step 2: Tune 1st Gear Standing start: Set 1st gear for an optimal launch. Focus on maximum acceleration off the line without excessive wheelspin.Rolling start: Set 1st gear based on the slowest corner exit on the track. Aim for optimal traction and a safe, controlled exit speed. Step 3: Tune Final GearSet the top gear for the fastest point on the circuit (e.g., longest straight). Add a margin for extra speed during drafting.Ensure you reach this top speed at the optimal RPM where maximum power is delivered (check the power/torque graph or first picture for peak values). Step 4: Distribute Intermediate Gears Start by spreading the intermediate gears evenly between 1st and final gear. This provides smooth progression and balanced acceleration.Fine-tune for specific corners:Sometimes, adjust a gear for better front grip on corner entry (via downshift RPM).Other times, optimize a gear for exit traction and control. This approach keeps your gearbox versatile while maximizing performance where it counts. Test iteratively on the track!

Citroen DS 21 Pallas '70 - FF - 460PP - Comfort Soft Tires - Alsace mission event - 1.66
Jan 7, 2026
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Size "15-Front St Remember: Normal brake (Only pad) and custom gearbox manual. I know this car very well. When I was a kid, my uncle had several of them. I never drove any, but I still remember the sensation as a passenger. I don’t know any other car that seemed to float above the ground while remaining so steady. Under the carpet and your feet, there was 5 cm of soft foam, and the shiny, leather seats had that unmistakable smell—truly a dream. Anyone who’s stepped into this car will tell you the same. It’s a KFO ("Known Flying Object"). Later, when I was 28, I owned an old CX 2500 Pallas. It was also a fantastic car, with the same suspension system and unique driving characteristics. They just don’t make cars like this anymore , it's a long time i don't own any real car but this car is really out of time ! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Jan 3, 2026

You can get some light drift if you overdrive it entering corners, but nothing dangerous—just losing some flow and speed. Better to be soft and respect the braking points in this special case.I'd prefer open downforce settings to play with the balance, but it's not possible on this car. 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** 6:25 on Nordschleife. It's a pilot car for sure—the reward is great. My fastest 700PP car on Nordschleife out of the very few swaps that have some PP bugs, like the Subaru Impreza '99 swap (6:14).2:13 on Spa in my hands.I made a more stable setup for this car—the excessive rotation was making it hard to drive fast. I had to tighten all the differential settings. Don't overdrive it, no late braking—just brake at the right mark and be very precise with the wheel during quick changes of direction, like right-left turn sequences.It's a pilot car for sure—the reward is great. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS700PPNordschleifePeugeot
BMW M3 GT '11 - GR3 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All track - 1.66
Dec 30, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Very performant Gr.3 car at this level. I use my Ferrari 458 GT3 ghost during my test , which is one of my best cars when maxed. The Ferrari has similar power but is a bit lighter. The BMW has a bit less acceleration—that's all. Everything else like grip, top speed, and handling is at a very high level. I love driving it; just take care exiting slow turns. I've set a long 1st gear to favor traction out of hairpins or very slow turns. Torque can cause wheel spin without this. Have a good drive. ><(((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 Rims "18 - Rim Width Original - Offset Original It's a lightweight car even with some ballast added. They're showing 200/300 downforce, but you can hardly feel any—just like the 4 big Brembo discs that aren't braking that well. In my opinion, they've messed with the original settings since launching this car. I tried setting it to 800PP too, but forgot about it. Undrivable—no brakes, no grip. The only decent PP range I've found is for the Le Mans event. There, it's performant, lapping under 4 minutes for the 3 laps. Remember to shift at 11,000 RPM—there's a drop in HP after that. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Dec 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing B I have a high-performance 500PP car with superior grip and excellent precision at the wheel. Nissan Skyline GT-R GP-Tuned (KPGC10) - FR - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.66
Dec 25, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Power pack Prize car. SWAP Engine: LZ20B-Skyline Customs Wheels 14" Rims -Rims Width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side st - Rear A - Wing St here is a major problem on this SWAP car.- No rear diffuser , no ground effect .-No downforce at all front or rear.A huge powered very peaky engine. This car brings some uncontrollable behaviors to deal with. At high RPM, the power comes on strongly, inducing a sudden loss of grip at any speed. Only use full throttle at low RPM, and only when the car is pointing straight. Out of turns, during a twisty section of the track, or when passing over any depression that unloads the rear wheels or upsets the chassis balance, I've tried my best to make the car steady and grippy. Just don't overdrive it, or the punishment will come without warning.It can still be quite performant at Le Mans, lapping in 3:53 using fuel mode 3 for 3 laps. When you drive the car smoothly, you'll also save tire wear throughout the whole stint.Sorry for the handling—I really tried to set up a soft, steady, and fast car, but it is what it is. It seems that this chassis, at least in the game, can't fully handle this engine swap.Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
700PPFRLe MansNissanSWAP
Season's greetings. 🎅🎄🧑‍🎄🎄
Dec 23, 2025
Dear Praiano's Tunes Patreon public & Members,As the holiday season revs up and we approach the end of another lap around the sun, I want to take a moment to send my warmest Season's Greetings to each and every one of you!You've been the ultimate pit crew—your incredible support has kept the garage running strong all year, allowing me to fine-tune more cars, chase those perfect setups, and share the joy of nailing that ideal line in GT7. Whether we're drifting through corners, grinding daily races, or pushing for those elusive 800PP beasts, you've made this community feel like a true racing family.Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being part of this journey. Your enthusiasm, feedback, and patronage mean the world and fuel every new tune I create.May your holidays be filled with joy, relaxation, good company, and maybe a few epic online races . Wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, and a New Year packed with fast times, big wins, and plenty of driving pleasure ahead.Let's make 2026 our fastest year yet—see you on the track!With gratitude and full throttle, Enjoy your live , your family and enjoy your drive with: PRAIANO'S TUNES : SETTINGS FOR GT7. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
Toyota Prius G '09 - FF - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.66
Dec 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body -Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Side A - Wing Standard It's a well-balanced, performant car—it almost doesn't show understeer or wheelspin out of corners, a rare behavior for an FF in thi game.The only thing that annoys me is the engine sound and the fact that there is no engine braking off throttle. The brakes work very well for trail-braking technique entering any corner. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
500PPFFToyota
BMW Z4 GT3 '11 Gr3 - MR - Gr3 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.66
Dec 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Very top performance under BOP , easy to drive very fast. Great pleasure at the wheel. I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power Excellent Gr.3 under BOP. I built an all-around setup tested on Nordschleife, Spa, Brands Hatch, Daytona Road, Watkins Glen… I favored top speed and stability, since the car already had great grip. Running with lower front downforce proved faster on every track I tested. Of course, it’s a compromise, but like I always say, you can use it anywhere with very good performance. The “Gr3 BOP” section is in the Collections, close to the Home Page button. They run under BOP rules (only weight and power are locked), but with all other settings open. BOP is the only way to ensure similar performance across all Gr.3 cars so they can race fairly. In online lobbies, you can usually adjust suspension, differential, downforce, gearbox (lately it seems only the final gear can be changed), and brake balance. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°
BMWBOPFRGr3
BMW Z4 GT3 '11 Gr3 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.66
Dec 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is a very good car for any kind of track. The downforce is at its minimum to prioritize speed—perfect for technical tracks like the Nordschleife. It has great precision, almost surgical for your driving line—a great pleasure to drive anywhere.You can do the Le Mans event with this configuration, but you can lower the front downforce if you prefer, gaining some more power for the long straights. Personally, this option feels so good—I prefer handling over speed, for a couple of seconds gained perhaps. Up to you.I'm also using the original gearbox—performant and 1 PP point less. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPBMWFRGr3
Alpine A110 '72 - RR - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo Rain Event - SWAP - 1.66
Dec 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Engine swap: SR20DET-Silvia-S15 Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front St - Wing Custom I've spent a long time on this car yesterday—mixed compound tires are the only way to make it performant on the Tokyo event. I had to test a lot of ballast weights and positions, together with different suspension settings. This one was the fastest and grippiest—you can drive it hard throughout the entire race, lapping 2:07 in my hands.Brakes on this car are very weak—check the braking points a lot earlier than with other cars. Top speed is superior; you'll need only 1 stop for gas. Mixed compounds with the harder one at the front can induce understeer entering a turn—downshift to give it a higher RPM to help with rotation and front grip. A bit more front downforce would be perfect, but this part is not available. It's not perfect to drive, but it's still fast and steady. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
600PPAlpineRRTokyo
Mercedes-Benz AMG VGT - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.66
Dec 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Original Wheels. Excellent all-around VGT car—I needed to add some ballast to compensate for the lazy front end, as aerodynamics aren't tunable to adjust the car's balance. Now you'll feel a very precise front end with great eagerness. It's lapping the same as the top 700PP road cars—a real joy to drive anywhere. Gas consumption is too high for Le Mans, but you can still race the event using fuel mode with some short-shifting technique. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nissan Sileighty '98 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.66
Dec 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine model: K24A-CivicWide BodyRims "17 / Rim width Wide / Offset WideFront A - Side A - Rear B - Wing B I was looking for grip and superior handling in this Nissan. The Civic's peaky engine screams at high RPM—a wonderful driver's car. It can be used on Le Mans in fuel mode 3 if I remember correctly, but its domain is technical, grip-oriented tracks. Top speed is very good when it comes into its own above 7,500 RPM.Excellent fun car—I could rank it at the 5-star level—but the overall performance is just good. Perhaps the engine is too peaky, and acceleration out of corners at mid-RPM is not so good, losing a few tenths to other very top 700PP road cars. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Ferrari GTO '84 - MR - 650PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - 1.66
Dec 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims '16 Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Wing Custom An agile grippy car with a very precise front end. I've added 126 kg ballast to the rear so it reacts like a real MR car, shifting the weight balance from 47/53 to 42/58. You have to play with the throttle off the pedal when entering corners to nail the apex. This was a special request—I normally load my best ghost, but I don't have any other 650 PP cars in my garage to compare against another top ghost. It seems very fast, and above all, it's a real pleasure to drive. You just need to move the final gear to adapt the gearbox for lower-speed tracks. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** One of the faster Gr.3 BOP setup so far. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine Swap : RS4-Espace This car has a short wheelbase and a relatively low downforce level (200/350), whereas a Gr.3 car can reach 450/700 to contain all that power. You can use traction control and avoid kerbs for a safer, more consistent drive.It's not very performant on technical tracks — around 2:09 at Spa, for example, which is 2 to 3 seconds slower than the top 800 PP race cars. On Daytona, however, this car can show its full potential, with superior top speed and grip. It's faster than any top Gr.3 car, regularly lapping 1:34 in my hands.Power and torque are brutal — be careful on exits from slow corners. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Dec 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front ST - Side ST - Rear ST - Wing A A very fast and pleasant drive. I favor grip over top speed, which is already very good. The light front end is very precise, like most RR Porsche 911s, but the rear is still steady. It's a car for any level of driver.Down there, I also published a 550PP tune—one of the faster cars at 550PP on the Nordschleife. A very top car, but it's a bit tricky to drive fast. It won't be in the listing, but for those who want to check, here it is. I allso tested the Medium tires 600PP same setting with more power for Tokyo. It drive very well but performance is just good , not so fast.
600PPNordschleifePorscheRR
Mine's BNR34 GT-R N1 base - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.65
Dec 6, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Original Wheells Rims 18" - Rim Width St - Offset St Front St - Side St - Rear St - Wing B Excellent car—I had to add some rear ballast to lighten the front end and eliminate the understeer. The other way would be to lower the rear downforce, but the PP would penalize the power a lot. It’s as fast as the best other 700PP cars, very pleasant and steady to drive, easy to drive very fast anywhere. Superior grip and top speed. Le Mans is possible in fuel mode, but you'll have to short-shift for the 3 laps anyway. Perfect for the Nordschleife. Enjoy your drive . ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mitsubishi FTO Version GP R '97 - FF - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.65
Dec 6, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 18" - rims width wide - Offset St Front B - Side A - Rear St - Wing B A top-tier 550PP car in terms of performance, mainly on the Nordschleife where it's my fastest car (non-swap) alongside the Honda S660 '15, lapping 7:33 in my hands. Very good on any other track too, but it prefers fast circuits with medium/high-speed turns—great grip and handling with a steady line. At the limit of traction exiting slow turns, like most FF cars. I don't think I'll do the other swap with more than 500 HP; it would surely suffer from horrible wheelspin. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Dec 5, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Heavier car than the 458, same power, a bit more torque, but identical performance to the old model. More stable too, with a very clean driving line and excellent handling. There’s a lot of power at very high RPM, so be careful exiting slow turns when you hit that rev range. Top-tier performance on any track – technical ones like Spa, Suzuka, or the Daytona road course included. Enjoy your drive.><(((((((°>°°°°°°
800PPFerrariGr3MR
Ferrari 296 '23 - MR - Gr3 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.65
Dec 5, 2025
It's a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight ,power and stock gearbox . Excellent Gr.3 under BOP. I built an all-around setup tested on Nordschleife, Spa, Brands Hatch, Daytona Road, Watkins Glen… I favored top speed and stability, since the car already had great grip. Running with lower front downforce proved faster on every track I tested. Of course, it’s a compromise, but like I always say, you can use it anywhere with very good performance. The “Gr3 BOP” section is in the Collections, close to the Home Page button. They run under BOP rules (only weight and power are locked), but with all other settings open. BOP is the only way to ensure similar performance across all Gr.3 cars so they can race fairly. In online lobbies, you can usually adjust suspension, differential, downforce, gearbox (lately it seems only the final gear can be changed), and brake balance. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°° Tags
BOPFerrariGr3
Gran Turismo F3500-B - MR - 950PP - Maxed - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.65
Dec 5, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Front A - Side B - Rear A Very fast open-wheel car – you have to brake late right up to the apex, making the most of the low weight and huge downforce. I completely freed up the differential to let the very precise steering work; it’s extremely reactive along with all the other driving inputs – a real pleasure to drive. This setup works perfectly on technical, grip-dependent tracks. You can reduce downforce equally front and rear for faster circuits; you might just need to stretch the gearbox slightly with a lower final gear setting only, without touching the already well-spaced ratios. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS950PPGran TurismoMR
Ferrari 296 GTB '22 - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Tracks - 1.65
Dec 4, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Body Original Wheels Rims "20 - Rim width St - Offset Wide Front A - Side B - Rear B - Wing: Custom Superior handling and grip, excellent top speed, very performant on technical tracks. You can use it on the Le Mans event—for this, you'll have to use fuel mode at level 6 for the 3 laps, lapping consistently around 4:00. A real pleasure to drive; take care not to overdrive the car or you'll get a controllable rear-end slide. I had to let it free to gain eagerness during successive turns. It deserves 5 stars, but it's right at the limit of this rating. 800PP coming soon. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Between the Le Mans setup using minimum downforce and this max downforce-oriented grip tune, you can fine-tune a medium downforce (same level front/rear) to fit any other track if needed. I've set the gearbox by ear (hearing the RPM), as there's no graphic available anymore. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

600PPFRNissan
Autobianchi A112 Abarth '85 - FF - 450PP - Comfort Soft - All Track - 1.63
Dec 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body- Size "13 / Rims width wide / Offset wide-Front St - Side St - Wing St A Nostalgic Drive – My First Real-Life Car This was my first car in real life, though mine was a '78 model. It didn’t have an air intake on the hood, just a vent, and the interior had less plastic. Everything else was identical—even the plate number! (You never forget your first plate.) In GT7, this 450PP version has more power—because a 70HP car would feel too slow—but my real car was fantastic and quick, especially in city traffic. Unfortunately, I totaled it as a young driver. I missed a turn, went straight, and stopped on a big stone after locking the brakes. Without ABS and lacking experience, I couldn’t regain grip mid-corner by releasing the brakes. A hard lesson learned, but I’ll always remember that car fondly. Enjoy oyur drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
450PPAutobianchiFF
Wicked Fabrication GT 51 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.63
Nov 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims "19 - rims width wide - Offset wideWing Custom Excellent performance with superior top speed – you can run it on the Nordschleife, where it's a top car at this 600PP level. It's so fast that you can even take it to the Tokyo event. I haven't tested it on soft compound tires, but it could be very competitive on short, slow, twisty tracks like Tsukuba or similar. It just doesn't earn a 5-star mention because the handling is merely good. It would need a superior driving sensation and meet all the criteria for that. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPFRNordschleifeRoad AtlantaTokyoWicked Fabrication
Nissan 180SX Type X '96 - FR - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo - 1.63
Nov 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide BodySize "19 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side St - Rear B - Wing Custom It’s relatively fast around the Tokyo event – in my hands, it consistently laps in the 2:09–2:10 range, which is usually enough for a comfortable 20–25 second lead. The car is extremely reactive and responds instantly to every input, especially throttle-off, steering angle, and trail-braking. You really have to work all of these together to hit the apexes perfectly. It’s an incredibly fun and involving way to drive through the corner sections lap after lap – you won’t get bored until you truly master this wonderful car. Cockpit view is a must if you want to extract the maximum speed; it’s just as fast (for me) as my usual bonnet/hood view. The brakes are on the weak side, so you need to brake a few car lengths earlier than you might expect and be very precise with your braking points to avoid missing apexes. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nov 25, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: SWAP LS7-Rampage (Roadster Shop Rampage) Wide Body -Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Wing Custom A fast, grippy car. I had to use soft tires to contain the power due to the poor chassis rigidity. It's on par with other 700 PP road cars and can be used in Le Mans events at fuel mode 5 or 6. It's better to use manual transmission; max power is at 5100 RPM—shift at 5500 RPM. Good cockpit view, like most older Japanese cars of this era. Nice to hear this LS7 Rampage engine sound. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

Nov 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Same entence as the Mercedes-Benz CLK-LM '98. Most of the time, Gr.2 cars aren’t performant at this level , they have a lot of downforce that lowers power and top speed. In this case, though, the car is so good to drive, with perfect handling and driving line, it’s on the pace of a Gr.3 car at 700 PP or with BoP applied. It’s perfect for technical tracks, even on Spa, which has some long straights sectors. It’s not so good for Le Mans, of course, but I think it can still win the event. Enjoy your drive ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Nov 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** The only adjustable settings are ballast position, ride height, and the differential, but they’re enough to drastically improve the car’s original poor behavior. With these tweaks, it’s transformed into a sharp, lightweight MR car that’s a pleasure to drive anywhere. While it’s not as competitive against the very best 600PP cars, the pace is still solid. However, be mindful—if you overdrive, you might lose the rear end. It’s a technical car to master, but overall, it remains easy to handle and lead effectively. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nov 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP: VR38DETT-GT-R- NISMO -Wide body- Size "19 - width wide - Offset wide-Front A - Side B - Rear St - Wing B This engine swap isn't more powerful than the original, and fuel consumption is about the same too. I only changed the suspension setup this time. Everything works perfectly with both engines (or any engine you choose). It's a very stable car with excellent grip and a decent top speed — close to 300 km/h (186 mph) at the end of the straight. It consistently laps in around 2:09 in a one-stop race. EDIT: Remember this car don't use racing brakes. Only pads. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nov 18, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Body- Size "16 - Rims width wide - Offset wide-Front B - Wing Custom This car delivers superior performance on any track, with excellent top speed and impressive grip. However, it's a heavy car, so pay close attention to your braking points. It's a very agile and responsive car — all driver inputs translate precisely, and the front end shows excellent eagerness and accuracy. The big-block 454 ci engine isn't ideal for Le Mans due to its high fuel consumption. To extract the best performance, remember to shift early — right at 6,800 RPM, where peak power is made. Beyond that point, power drops off sharply. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. FRGr3MitsubishiWTC800
Mitsubishi Lancer EVO IX MR GSR '06 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.63
Nov 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide carRims "18 - Rim width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Standard The swap engine is only slightly more performant — almost unnoticeable. This setup earns 4 stars when compared to the swap version, mainly because of the swap’s better fuel consumption. You can use the swap setup with the original engine, and vice versa — they’re fully interchangeable without any issues. I’ve also created a new setup with a freer rear end. The swap setup is more planted and better suited for tracks like the Nordschleife, while this new version feels a bit looser, offering a different driving experience. It’s very performant on any track, matching the pace of the best 700PP road cars.The choice is yours! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nov 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is an excellent car for fast, technical tracks like Daytona and SPA. It’s easy to drive, but be mindful of wheel spin coming out of slow and medium-speed corners. For the WTC800 event , you can use medium tires / fuel mode 4 to 5 and 1 stop only. I like to use also traction control at 1 for an easier out slow corners. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Oct 31, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car- Size "18-Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing A This FF car handles 600PP and 380HP without significant wheel spin. While FF cars aren’t my favorite to drive, this one is at least pleasant to handle and offers good performance, keeping up with some of the good ghosts I have in this range on Nordschleife, lapping around 7:12 in my hands. The gearbox is tuned specifically for this track. At first glance, the last gear, set to 340 km/h, might seem too long. However, keep in mind that the car’s power peak is around 7000 RPM, and you need to hit that RPM to achieve max speed on the final straight. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide body car.Rims size 15" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Side B - Rear B - Wing CustomTop car with excellent handling . I love driving it at Brands Hatch too. It has great precision at the wheel, lapping around 7:09 in my hands. MR cars definitely have the best driving behavior in the game, in my opinion. A solid choice for sure.Congrats to @mr_trademark for the wonderfull livery. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
600PPMRNordschleifeToyota
Lamborghini Huracan LP 610-4 '15 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.63
Oct 30, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE WAP : Bugatti ChironWide CarRims 19" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side St - Wing Custom This chassis, at least in the game, can’t really handle all that power. I did my best to tighten the car around all four corners , but not too much. Just don’t overdrive it: avoid late braking, and remember that the speed is phenomenal. If you stay on your line without exceeding the grip limit and manage its massive 1,851 HP, the lap times will speak for themselves , 2:04 at Spa and 1:28 at Daytona.Top-tier performance indeed, but in my opinion, the driving pleasure just isn’t there. I prefer the other two Aventador 800PP builds , they’re much more enjoyable to drive. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Egine SWAP : Hellcat-Charger (Dodge Charger SRT Hellcat) Wide bodyRims size 20" Front A Wing Custom Here is the SWAP version first.Normally, this setup also fits the original-engine model. Now equipped with Soft compound tires, it delivers superior grip and precise handling , a real pleasure to drive, especially on tracks like the Nordschleife. This is a very performant car. As with most of my muscle builds, I’ve added rear ballast to reduce wheel spin caused by the massive torque and power. The ballast also improves front-end precision. It’s not ideal for Le Mans, due to high fuel consumption, but it remains steady, predictable, and fast on any technical circuit. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 18" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Wing A This car shows almost no wheel spin, even at 600PP and 389 HP. It drives exceptionally well, with excellent front grip and eagerness. In terms of performance, it can compete with any good car in this class, regardless of drivetrain,though the very top cars will still stay ahead. It’s a pleasure to drive, which is a rare quality for FF cars in this game. You’ll need throttle control to manage wheel spin in 1st and 2nd gears, but it’s not a problem at all,it’s very easy to handle. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
600PPFFRenault
KTM X-BOW R '12 - MR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.63
Oct 25, 2025
ENGGINE WAP: Suzuki V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 (Suzuki Vision GT Gr.3) 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** - Size "17 & "18 - Rims width wide - Offset wide Since there’s no option to adjust the car’s balance through aerodynamics, I’ve added a small amount of ballast to the front to fine-tune it to my liking. The ballast is set at 29 kg, positioned at –50. This keeps the car light while allowing for a bit more power and better top speed. For technical tracks, medium tires provide extra grip. On Le Mans, switching to hard compounds can help you gain even more speed — though the mediums are already very fast. It’s up to you. In terms of performance, it’s solid but not exceptional: Nordschleife: around 6:35Spa: around 2:18Le Mans: 4:00 on medium tires, fuel mode 0 for 3 laps Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Oct 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** The original setup is already very good , even at minimum levels, the downforce is incredibly strong. Increasing it further only limits top speed and doesn’t provide enough benefit on most tracks. I’ve made a few adjustments: created a new gearbox, added a bit more rake with a higher rear ride height, and loosened the differential to improve agility and responsiveness. Of course, it’s a fantastic machine to drive and fully deserves a 5-star rating.This setup also works perfectly for both the Red Bull X2019 Competition and the Red Bull X2019 Competition 25th Anniversary (2019) versions. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Alfa Romeo 4C '14 - MR - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.63
Oct 13, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: F136F-458 Ferrari 458 Wide car Rims "16&"17 - Offset Wide - Rims wide -Front A - Side A - Wing Custom A very performant 700PP road car, lapping impressive 2:15 at Spa and 4:00 at Le Mans (fuel mode 6 with a bit of short shifting). It wasn’t an easy car to tune, but the result is worth it. You’ll notice I didn’t use racing brakes—the originals are strong enough, and that allows me to add more power. It could have earned a five-star rating if the handling were perfect, but that’s not quite the case. The engine sound in cockpit view is particularly satisfying. I kept the original muffler because I love the raw scream of the engine, it really enhances the immersive driving experience. Enjoy your drive ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

It also performs well on technical tracks, though it’s not as competitive as the very top 800PP road cars , around 1.5 seconds slower at Spa, for example. Oct 6, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide car Rims size "17 & "18 - Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Wing custom Excellent RR car , the front end points with great precision, and the rear remains steady even with the 39/61 weight balance. 600PPDMCNordschleifeRR
Toyota TS050 Hybrid '16 - MR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - Sardegna - 1.63
Oct 6, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** The KERS system on this car runs almost empty after just one lap. It gets only a small charge under braking and delivers a strong burst of power out of the initial corners , but becomes completely unusable on longer straights, at least during the Sardegna event. Strangely, in Time Trial mode it works perfectly fine… a bit of a mystery. The car can lap 1:31 in Time Trial, and around 1:34 regular during the WTC800 race, which is still very fast. Despite the KERS issue, this car offers excellent driving pleasure. It has tons of grip, is easy to control, and remains stable even at high pace. Top speed isn’t great, but you can go full throttle most of the time and complete the race with just one fuel stop. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
800PPGr1MRSardegnaToyota
Nissan Z Performance '23 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.63
Oct 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP : VR38DETT-GT-R-Nismo (Nissan GT-R NISMO '17) -Wide body- Size "19 -Rims width wide - Offset wide-Front A - Side A - Rear A - Wing Custom The original setup was far from ideal, but I’ve finally found a new balance that elevates this car to an entirely new level. It now matches the pace of the Porsche 911 '16 while offering slightly higher top speed, making it perfect for technical tracks. That said, it’s worth noting that while the car has potential for Le Mans, its high fuel consumption limits its performance. Using fuel mode 6 and short-shifting isn’t just recommended—it’s mandatory to manage the fuel efficiently. On the bright side, this car is a joy to drive. The 9-speed gearbox provides exceptional control, allowing you to fine-tune RPMs out of corners and minimize wheel spin. It’s a balanced, capable setup that delivers both precision and power when handled correctly. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
700PPFRNissanSWAP
Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40V '74 - 4WD - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.63
Oct 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide BodyRims '15 - Rim width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Rear A - Rear A Excellent car. This is a specific tune for the Nordschleife, with superior performance at the 500PP level , lapping 7:51, right alongside some of the very rare 500PP non-swap cars. It’s also excellent for online lobby racing. For more technical and slower tracks like Brands Hatch or Tsukuba, use a shorter gearbox using final drive setting , you can increase the front downforce (though you’ll sacrifice some power). It’s certainly more fun that way, but I personally prefer favoring speed and stability in high-speed corners. This brings a steadier line through fast bend sequences, while top speed remains a big advantage on the long straights. The original brakes are surprisingly good , a big surprise given the old drum system on all four wheels. This is working on GT only , this setup even helps lower the PP, allowing you to add a bit more power. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40V '74 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.63
Sep 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: LS7-Rampage Wide BodyRims '18 - Rim width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Rear A - Rear A I’m not very happy with this car. I tried to set it up properly, but there’s a small suspension bug that makes it unpredictable at times. Avoid stepping onto the grass inside the corners — it makes the car behave strangely. To compensate, I had to tighten the differential to keep the line more stable; otherwise, it rotates too much and becomes difficult to drive fast. I’ll prepare an original setup at 600PP, which I think is a lot better. Currently lapping 2:20 at Spa, but fuel consumption is far too high for Le Mans. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Dode Viper Gr4 - MR - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.63
Sep 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Excellent and Performant 700PP This is an excellent 700PP car with strong overall performance. While it could benefit from slightly less top speed to better compete with the top cars, its grip and handling more than make up for it. It’s well-suited for Le Mans, reaching almost 295 km/h at the end of the straight in fuel-saving mode, and it’s also an amazing drive on the Nordschleife. Adjust the gearbox using the final drive setting to lengthen or shorten the ratios depending on the track you’re racing on. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Normal Body Rims "19 - Offset Wide - Rims wide -Front A - Side B - Rear B - Wing A Excellent car with superior grip and handling. It’s very fun to drive and highly reactive , just be sure to synchronize all your inputs, as the rear end is quite lively. The setup is on the safe side, but you can reduce rear downforce or increase the front for even more balance. It’s especially fun on Tsukuba, though of course you’ll need to shorten the gearbox using the final drive. The current gearbox is tuned for the Nordschleife. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide BodyRims '19 - Rim width St - Offset StFront B - Side St - Rear A - Wing A Normally, the main issue for this car at this level is front wheel spin out of slow and medium-speed corners. Top speed is still good, and the grip is excellent. The car shows great eagerness, is easy to place, and offers superior front grip. 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP: Evo-Final-Gr.B (Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution Gr.B Rally Car) Wide car Rims "19 - Offset Wide - Rims wide 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP: Evo-Final-Gr.B (Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution Gr.B Rally Car) Wide car Rims "19 - Offset Wide - Rims wide -Front B - Side A - Rear B - Wing B ( I love this B wing 😉) Superior handling, exceptional grip, excellent top speed, and low fuel consumption make this car suitable for Le Mans. 4WD5 STARS700PPMitsubishiNordschleife
Ferrari 458 Italia GT3 '13 - MR - Gr3 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.62
Sep 14, 2025
I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power Excellent Gr.3 under BOP. I built an all-around setup tested on Nordschleife, Spa, Brands Hatch, Daytona Road, Watkins Glen… I favored top speed and stability, since the car already had great grip. Running with lower front downforce proved faster on every track I tested. Of course, it’s a compromise, but like I always say, you can use it anywhere with very good performance. The “Gr3 BOP” section is in the Collections, close to the Home Page button. They run under BOP rules (only weight and power are locked), but with all other settings open. BOP is the only way to ensure similar performance across all Gr.3 cars so they can race fairly. In online lobbies, you can usually adjust suspension, differential, downforce, gearbox (lately it seems only the final gear can be changed), and brake balance. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is a specific tune for the Nordschleife with softer springs, as usual, so you can go over low kerbs without any problem. The car can also be used on other tracks, like Spa for the 1H event. It laps in 6:05 in my hands. It’s not an easy car to push at the limit , if you overdrive it, it can get nasty. My Porsche Gr.3, for example, is about three seconds faster. Not necessarily because it’s the quicker car , maybe just a bit , but because it’s safer when driven on the edge. The cockpit view and engine sound are amazing in VR2. I run traction control set to 1, since the peaky engine can cause wheel spin at very high RPM. It’s brutal, and you can lose the rear end in a fraction of a second. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Ford Mustang '15 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.62
Sep 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP : Windsor-351-Maverick. Wide Car. Rims 21" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Side A - Wing Custom A very performant car at the 700PP level, offering superior grip , perfect for technical tracks. I’d rate it as a 4-star car. The original engine shows slightly better performance in my opinion, but with similar overall behavior. It laps Spa in the high 2:17s, matching the pace of the Porsche 911 ’16. Handling is excellent, with great precision at the wheel. However, it’s not ideal for the Le Mans 700PP event due to its high fuel consumption. I chose Racing Medium tires because the car felt a bit twitchy on harder compounds, losing traction out of slow corners. The added grip, combined with increased power, more than makes up for the slight PP loss. Overall, it’s a very solid and enjoyable car to drive! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Aug 31, 2025
This car only work well using mixed conpounds tires. Harder one at front. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims "16 - Rim width WideThis car only work well using mixed conpounds tires. Harder one at front. It has superior top speed but very weak brakes, no racing brakes available, only the original drum system ,so be mindful of your braking points. The balance is neutral and as steady as possible without any downforce. Because of this, I use Racing tires on the front to compensate for the lack of grip. Overall, it’s a performant car, lapping 7:10 on the Nordschleife in my hands. You can race it in public lobbies (with tuning allowed, of course) as long as there are no restrictions on Racing or Sport tires. The cockpit view is fantastic, and the engine sound is terrific at high RPM , especially when the supercharger kicks in with its strident whistling noise. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

Aug 31, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : Mitsubishi EVO Final Gr B -Wide body-Size "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset Wide-Front A - Side B - Wing A Powerful swap engines are often problematic on FF cars. Depending on the model, they generate a lot of front wheel spin. You can’t really set the car at higher power levels, because it feels like driving on ice when you try to put the power down. I did my best to make it performant with decent handling. It’s not fantastic, but you can still race at the same pace as most good 600PP road cars. Note: I didn’t use racing brakes here. The stock brakes are already good, though of course not as effective as racing ones. I left them stock to allow a bit more power and speed. Personally, I think the best option for this car is to use the original version tuned at 500PP. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

Audi R8 LMS Evo '19 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.61

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** This is my fastest Gr.3 800PP car so far—even quicker than the McLaren F1. It performs exceptionally well on both high-speed and technical tracks, with a solid 2:06 lap time on Spa , 1:35 Daytona road. 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Modiied livery from : badgerr869 This is currently my fastest Gr.3 800PP car, even quicker than the legendary McLaren F1. It performs exceptionally well across both high-speed circuits and technical tracks, clocking impressive lap times such as 2:06 at Spa and 1:35 on Daytona Road. I recently updated the setup to improve stability and reduce excessive pivot. Previously, it was difficult to hit the apex consistently on technical tracks with high kerbs, such as the Nordschleife. With the update, the car is now much easier to control, allowing you to push harder with confidence. As expected from a well-balanced MR race car, it delivers precise handling and strong traction, making it both fast and enjoyable to drive at the limit. Enjoy your drive.><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Volkswagen 1200 '66 - RR - 700PP - Racing Medium & Soft Tires (Mixed) - All Track - SWAP - 1.61
Aug 25, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE : M64/03-911 Wide Body -Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Rear A - Wing A This car suff 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE : M64/03-911 Wide Body -Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Rear A - Wing A This car suffers from a major chassis and suspension issue. It generates excessive rotation and unpredictable grip variation when pushed to the limit, especially around the four corners. The rear end becomes unstable and erratic, making the car almost undrivable at times. The sensation is unpleasant—you cannot focus on maintaining speed or clean racing lines, but instead must fight just to keep the car on the track. As a result, overall performance drops by nearly 50% simply to complete a lap consistently. Very frustrating indeed. There are two possible solutions to mitigate this problem: Front ballast – Adding weight to the front can neutralize the balance. However, this comes at a cost: reducing traction at the rear. Since this is a powerful, torquey car, the lighter rear end makes throttle management tricky and can compromise acceleration.Mixed tire compounds – Equipping the front with one grade harder tires is often the better option. This helps stabilize the front–rear balance without sacrificing rear traction and stability under acceleration. With the second setup, the car becomes much more manageable. You can drive it aggressively, and it feels safe even when racing in close packs. Performance is still only “good” compared to the very best 700PP cars, but it works well in monotype events—especially when matched against maxed-out VW 1200 builds. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

As it stands, I’ve achieved a solid 4-star setup. The handling is excellent , precise, stable, and very rewarding to drive , with a well-balanced chassis and eager responses. It delivers strong top speed, grip, acceleration, and superior braking performance, which is especially impressive given the car’s weight. That said, the performance falls just short of the very best. It is still extremely competitive, running close to the top 5-star benchmark cars. For example, it can consistently lap around 2:18.xx at Spa, and it performs exceptionally well on the Nordschleife too. With a bit more fine-tuning, this could easily climb into the 5-star category. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS600PPFerrariMRNordschleife
Honda S660 '15 - MR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All track - SWAP - 1.61
Aug 17, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP : Honda SE75E-2&4 (Honda 2&4) Wide body Rims 17" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Wing Custom Very performant car on the Nordschleife, lapping consistently at 7:07. It offers superior grip and top speed, with very good , though not perfect , handling. It still deserves a 5-star mention. Remember to trail brake all the way to the apex. If you release the brakes too early thinking the car will maintain the same balance while coasting, you’ll lose front grip and miss your line. Trail braking properly ensures stability and precision. The gearbox is tuned for the Nordschleife, but the suspension setup works perfectly on any track. For other circuits, simply adjust the gearbox by setting the final drive ratio. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPHondaMRNordschleifeSWAP
Honda S660 '15 - MR - 400PP - Comfort Soft Tires - All track - 1.61
Aug 16, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body Rims 13" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Wing Custom In my opinion, this is the best car to learn proper driving techniques in GT. It’s stable and responsive without being overly reactive, which makes it easy to understand how driving inputs work in a controlled manner , almost like driving in slow motion. You have the time to establish your racing line, modulate your speed without over-braking, and practice clean, fast corner exits. It’s an excellent machine for the Lightweight Cup. While not an easy win—since the competition has similar performance, it’s also ideal for lobby racing at 400PP on the Nordschleife. The gearbox is tuned for the Nordschleife, but you can add 200 kg of ballast to improve top speed on faster tracks. On twistier layouts with long straights, performance remains consistent and reliable. The Daihatsu Copen is slightly faster, with about 8 km/h more top speed, but the Honda offers better grip and sharper handling, making it the more enjoyable choice for technical driving. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
400PP5 STARSHondaMRNordschleife
Daihatsu Copen '02 - FF - 400PP - Comfort Soft Tires - All Track - 1.61
Aug 16, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body Rims 14" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front St - Side St - Rear St - Wing Custom Perfect for Lightweight Cup and 400PP Races Compared to the Honda S660, the Daihatsu offers better top speed but slightly less grip. The Honda, on the other hand, delivers a more enjoyable handling experience. On grip-oriented tracks, I prefer the Honda. However, the Daihatsu is more effective on faster circuits, such as the Nordschleife, where it’s about 8 km/h faster on the straights. This car is ideal for the Lightweight Cup or any 400PP race, even on the Nordschleife, where I particularly enjoy driving cars like this. It’s perfect for learning how to drive fast without over-braking, staying on a clean, quick line. It might feel like slow motion, but it’s an excellent learning tool. EDIT: Remember you'll have to shift earlier , power drop a lot at 9000 RPM (Not ok for automatic transmission use). Enjoy your drive . ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide car Rims "17 - RIm Width wide - Offset Standard Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing A I’ve spent a long time work 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide car Rims "17 - RIm Width wide - Offset Standard Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing A I’ve spent a long time working on this car , it was very hard to find the sweet spot. 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP : LT5-Corvette-C7 (Chevrolet Corvette C7 ZR1) Wide Body Rims "17 - Rims width wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Rear B - Wing Custom I did a new rear ballast tune to contain the wheel spin. It's a lot better this way and still a few more faster due to a better traction. "Dr. Frankenstein" SWAP Engine: Superior 700PP Performance This is another Dr. Frankenstein SWAP—full power on Racing Soft tires with a rear diffuser, creating a totally superior 700PP machine. Honestly, it almost feels like it needs its own class to keep things fair against the rest of the 700PP lineup. It’s not ideal for Le Mans, as it can’t complete a single lap on Fuel Mode 1 and manages only two laps on FM6 with short shifting. However, it delivers an incredible sub-2:11 lap at Spa. Handling is excellent, and this time, I didn’t use any rear ballast to tame the power. Instead, I prioritized a lighter setup with a shorter braking distance. Despite its 968 HP, the car’s overall balance remains superb. Enjoy your drive ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Like most Gr.3 cars set at 700PP, this one has only medium top speed, but its handling and grip are truly superior. It’s a wonderful car to drive. Performance is still very goodla, pping Spa in 2:18, for example, and it’s capable of matching the pace of the best 700PP cars in the game. I’ve added some rear ballast to lighten the front end, which allowed me to reduce the front downforce (lowering PP), eliminate rear wheelspin out of slow corners, and give more precision to steering inputs. It’s the perfect weapon for technical tracks. Just adjust the gearbox using the final gear to suit either slower or faster circuits. Have a good drive. ><(((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : RB26DETT-GT-R-R34 (Nissan Skyline R34 GT-R V-Spec II Nur '02)Wide CarRims 18" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Side B - Rear St - Wing Custom This car matches the pace, grip, and speed of the Porsche 911 ’16. The front end is precise and eager to respond, making it a joy to drive. I added 120 kg of ballast at the rear (position 50). This not only removes understeer, thanks to a lighter, more precise front end, but also greatly improves traction and reduces wheelspin, enhancing overall balance and drivability. It’s not the best choice for Le Mans due to high fuel consumption, but it’s still doable by using Fuel Map 6 along with short-shifting. You’ll also need a longer gearbox, which you can achieve by lowering the final gear ratio. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This car isn’t faster than the original setup, but I’ve made it easier to drive and more suited to my driving style. I'm going to put a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

600PPFRNissanNordschleife
Ford F-150 SVT Raptor '11 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.61
Aug 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: Windsor-351-Maverick Wide BodyRims 19" - Rim Width Wide -Offset WideFront B - Side A - Rear A (This is only cosmetic) This was a very difficult car to set up, there’s a major bug in the suspension. It’s under control now, but don’t overdrive it, especially on twisty tracks. The car doesn’t respond well to late braking or aggressive use of kerbs. That said, it’s a very capable performer on most types of tracks: high 2:15s at Spa and around 6:30 on the Nordschleife. You just need to get used to its behavior. Once you do, you can even use that little bug to your advantage, especially the light and reactive rear end, which becomes unstable when pushed too hard. With the right amount of brake on entry and precise steering input, it can actually be a lot of fun to drive. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD700PPFordSWAP
BAC Mono '16 - MR - 700PP - Sport Soft Tires - Mission Trial Mountain - 1.61
Aug 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims "18 - Rim Width Original - Offset Original I revisited this old tune to see if I could improve it, but I couldn't find a better fast and safe option. I love it just the way it is. It consistently laps around 1:56.xxx when out of traffic in my hands. It's an easy and fast setup, just takes a bit of getting used to. The first gear is short for the final chicane, while second gear is longer to avoid wheelspin out of slow corners, yet still offers good traction. You can use Traction Control 1 for a safer drive. It’s a very fun car to drive. Stick to the racing line, be smooth and consistent, and you'll start getting faster laps after just a couple of runs. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPBACMR
Plymouth XNR Ghia Roadster '60 - FR - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.61
Aug 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Size "20 - Rim Width wide There’s a very narrow sweet spot when tuning this car. Before reaching it, the car lacks rotation and feels unresponsive to driver input. Go beyond that point, and it becomes unpredictable and difficult to handle—ready to surprise you at any moment without warning. After a lot of trial and error, I finally found the setup where it stops fighting you through every corner. It becomes enjoyable to drive, with smooth handling progression and solid performance. It responds well to both throttle and steering inputs. Braking performance isn’t great, but that’s intentional—I avoided racing brakes to maintain power and speed at the 500PP level. Even so, it can hold its own against any medium to high-performance 500PP car on any track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Volkswagen Sambabus TypII '62 - FF - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.61
Aug 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: M64/03-911 (Porsche 911 964 Carrera RS) -Size "14 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide You need some extreme settings to make this "bus" drivable. It's far from perfect, but it's fast and competitive at the 600PP level. You can race it against other strong performers in this category. It handles surprisingly well on any kind of track, even twisty, technical ones. The rear end rotates nicely, responding well to throttle modulation both on and off. Just avoid cutting over grassy apexes , if you're not ready, the rear can snap out unexpectedly at that moment. Top speed isn't great due to its squared front end, which creates a lot of air resistance. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPRRSWAPVolkswagen
Volkswagen Golf I GTI '83 - FF - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.61
Jul 31, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front B - Side St - Rear A - Wing A With the engine maxed out, it's reaching 600PP using the rear Part A (diffuser). This adds superior grip and near-perfect handling, though top speed and acceleration are slightly below other top 600PP cars. Still, it performs very well, and the driving sensation is genuinely enjoyable and rewarding, perfect for a track like the Nordschleife. I don’t think I’ll go for a swap engine tune, the Suzuki Escudo engine is simply too powerful and would introduce a lot of wheelspin, which I really dislike on FF cars. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
Subaru WRX STI I.O.Man '16 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.61
Jul 31, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP: LS7- BRZRims Size "18 Compared to the original tune, I was able to add more power to this swap engine while keeping it at 700PP using Hard compound tires. The car remains very grippy, now with an extra 140HP, allowing it to match the top speed of the best 700PP road cars. It’s an excellent all-around combination for any track, lapping 2:16 at Spa and 6:30 on the Nordschleife. You just need to understand how it drives. The inputs are similar to most 4WD cars: you need to give good steering angle both on corner entry and exit to counter understeer. But once you reach the apex and release the brakes, avoid adding any steering input, doing so will induce oversteer and cause the rear to lose grip. It’s not dramatic, just a slight drift, but it’s enough to cost you speed and mess up your line. After a few laps, you'll adapt to its behavior. It’s a high-performance car with excellent driving pleasure. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Renault Clio V6 23V '00 - MR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.61
Jul 30, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: EJ20-Impreza-Rally (Subaru Impreza Rally Car '98) Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing B Good performance, but not a top-tier 700PP car. Excellent driving experience. It suits any type of track, with good top speed, impressive grip, and precise steering. The car is highly responsive to driver inputs while remaining safe and stable under hard driving. It’s a true MR car, reacting exactly as you'd expect. The rear slides naturally into the ideal slip angle, while the precise front-end response lets you place the car exactly where you want it. It’s an excellent choice for learning how to drive MR cars fast and stay right on the edge of control. I absolutely love driving it on tracks like : mount Panorama , Le Mans , Brands Hatch, the Nordschleife, or any technical circuit. Perfect for the WTC700 Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body Rims 18" - Rim Width Standard - Offset Standard Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom This car is a true performance machine , blisteringly fast and incredibly grippy. It clocks in under 6 minutes on the Nordschleife and laps Spa in just 2:05, making it one of the most capable options in its category. What really stands out is how effortless it is to drive at high speed. Whether you're on a flowing circuit or a tight technical track, the car remains composed and responsive. Acceleration out of corners is sharp and immediate, giving you a clear edge in sprints and quick transitions. It also handles kerbs with confidence, staying stable and planted even in aggressive racing conditions. However, it does come with a trade-off: high fuel consumption. This makes it less suitable for endurance events like Sardegna, where fuel efficiency plays a critical role. It's a joy to drive and a powerful contender on any track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Rims size 18" It’s a wonderful car to drive , perhaps the best and fastest Gr.4 under the latest BOP. It feels incredibly eager, with great precision at the wheel and is easy to drive very fast , safe during hard battle in a pack for example.Perfect for Nordschleife, Trial Mountain, or even Tsukuba , a truly versatile car with thrilling performance. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track.

900PPMRMcLaren
Hyundai Genesis Gr3 - Gr3 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track / Grip - 1.60
Jul 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This car lacks the top-end speed and launch acceleration needed to run with the quickest Gr.3 competitors when fully maxed. Its competitive edge is chassis performance: high grip, stability, and precise handling balance. It performs best on circuits dominated by medium-speed, flowing corner sequences where momentum can be maintained. It is less effective on stop-and-go layouts with slow hairpins (where weak acceleration is exposed) and on tracks with long straights (where its lower terminal speed costs time). As a result, it is not a strong choice for Daytona Road Course or Le Mans, but it can be highly competitive at Suzuka; conditionally viable at Spa; and well suited to Road Atlanta, Laguna Seca, Watkins Glen, and similar momentum circuits. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°
800PPFRGr3Hyundai
Honda NSX Type R '02 - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Le Mans - SWAP - 1.60
Jul 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: HR-414E-NSX (Honda NSX GT500 '16) Wide BodyRims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side A - Rear St - Wing A This car delivers moderate overall performance across most track types. Its handling is well-balanced, with predictable behavior and a precise driving line, offering confidence in both high- and low-speed sections. The key highlight is its exceptional fuel efficiency, making it highly suitable for the 700PP 30-minute event at Le Mans. It allows for fuel map 1 and full power deployment over the initial three laps without compromising race strategy. The top speed exceeds 300 km/h (186 mph), which ensures strong performance on long straights. Additionally, the cockpit view is excellent, and the engine note provides an engaging, high-revving character that enhances the driving experience. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

Chevrolet Chevelle SS 454 '70 - FR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All tracks- 1.60
Jul 15, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide CarRims 14"Rims With Wide - Offset WideFront A - Wing Custom Fastest Road Car on Nordschleife (7:06) It's a fast, grippy car. I chose the soft compound this time, which still provides decent power and speed, but the feel is completely different. It sticks to the road with excellent drivability and precision. The gearbox is set for the Nordschleife, but you can opt for a shorter one by increasing the final drive.Even the racing brakes are weak, so check your braking points. Brake one or two car lengths earlier than usual with this type of car. That said, it's still a very good car, and the classic cockpit view is a highlight—wide, open, and immersive. Driving it in these conditions is a true pleasure. NOTE: It's critical to use the engine tuning parts to maximize RPM at peak power (6400 RPM). You must shift at 6400 RPM, as there is a significant loss of power beyond this point. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
