5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide carRims size 14" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Rear A - Wing B At the 600PP level, this car could use a bit more power. Its speed is decent, but acceleration is limited, even for such a light car. The handling and grip are fantastic, making it an excellent car to drive anywhere. It laps the Nordschleife in 7:12 not the fastest, but comparable to other cars like the Lancia Stratos. I love it. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPFRNordschleifeToyota
Toyota Sprinter Trueno 1600GT APEX (AE86) '83 - FR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.60
Jul 11, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide carRims size 14" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Rear A - Wing B A top-tier 550PP road car, this machine is truly impressive. I prioritize stability and control here, which is why I’m using the Rear Part A diffuser. This time i use racing brakes and pads. The engine is peaky, so you’ll need to shift at very high RPM, close to the electronic limiter. You'll need to adjust the gearbox for each track — whether it's slow or fast — due to the engine’s power delivery. This current gearbox setup is tuned for Nordschleife . To adapt it for other tracks, just adjust the final gear — that way, you'll maintain the same gear ratios while adjusting for slower or faster circuits. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Jul 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wing A This car performs well at 800PP, but not exceptionally. With its high downforce, you should use minimum front wing and maximum rear wing. This keeps the PP relatively low, allowing you to add more power and achieve a decent top speed to compete with other Gr.2 cars. It’s a compromise.At Spa, it laps around 2:06, and at Sardegna, it achieves 1:33 out of traffic. You can manage a one-stop fuel strategy by running Fuel Map (FM) 2 or 3 for one of the stints.I’ve aimed to make the car enjoyable by balancing grip and speed, rather than focusing solely on maximum grip, as you might at higher PP settings where grip can be prioritized. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - rims width St - Offset St Front up to you - Rear up to you This gearbox is tuned for the Nordschleife, but 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - rims width St - Offset St Front up to you - Rear up to you This gearbox is tuned for the Nordschleife, but it works well as an all-around setup, from Tsukuba to other technical tracks , just need to set a shorter gearbox using final drive. 4WD600PPLanciaNordschleife
Lancia Delta HF Integrale RC '92 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.60
Jul 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - rims width St - Offset St Front up to you - Rear up to you This is a very fast car, 2:17 low on Spa, unde 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - rims width St - Offset St Front up to you - Rear up to you This is a very fast car, 2:17 low on Spa, under 4 minutes on Le Mans. For Le Mans, you'll need a longer gearbox (using a lower final drive) to short-shift and save fuel, as it consumes a lot at high RPM where the power is. It could earn a 5-star rating due to its excellent performance, but the handling isn’t very good. During weight transfer, the car exhibits a strange loss of grip, strange in the sense that it transitions from 100% grip to 50% very abruptly. I’d prefer a smoother grip transition, like in most top-tier 4WD cars. If you overdrive the car, you’ll notice understeer due to this issue, and you’ll have to wait for the front grip to recover. It forces a passive driving style that I don’t particularly like. I’ve tried adjusting various settings to fix this behavior, but without success.It's also a very good car to drive using stock settings, together with friends in an online lobby. Very fun . Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°°°°°

Jun 29, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Car. Rims 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Wing Custom Initially, I thought this wasn’t the best PP range for this car, but I was wrong. It’s not the fastest car in terms of top speed, but its handling and grip are exceptional. Jun 28, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** It's a FF car , the mention 4WD in the game is wrong. I didn’t know what to do with this car at first—it had horrible wheel spin and was a struggle to drive. To reduce the wheel spin, I added 200kg ballast at the front and set it at 800PP to lower the power. With these adjustments, it works well on Sardegna , laping 1:32 1:33 , for a sub 24 minutes race, it have a low fuel consumption—just one stop and a race time under 24 minutes. It’s not a fantastic drive, but it’s at least pleasant now. I also tested it in the 1H SPA, and it performs decently there too. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: K14C-Swift (Suzuki Swift Sport '17) Wide Body Size "17 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide Front B - Side B 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: K14C-Swift (Suzuki Swift Sport '17) Wide BodySize "17 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side B - Rear B "This car is a superior 450PP option due to a PP bug, allowing it to carry 350 HP with the same settings as the original engine tune but with stiffer springs to accommodate the car's increased weight. Its performance is comparable to a top-tier 500PP car. "Note: The brake balance in this game feels completely off. Typically, brake balance has minimal impact on a car's handling response. However, for this specific car, the behavior is reversed. A +5 setting, which should theoretically make the car more aggressive (with a rear-biased brake balance), produces the opposite effect, resulting in a softer response under braking and allowing for greater steering angle." Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
450PP4WDBrands HatchNordschleifeSWAPSuzuki
Lamborghini Huracán Gr4 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 25, 2025
I've tried to take out some understeer on this car , this is a very performant car , a bit sharp on brakes entering corners , so don't brake late so hard giving a strong driving input. In this case , you can drift losing some precious time. I can save a whole second on a 2 minutes lap with this car against stock suspension & downforce. All cars in GT after news physics need to be driving the right way. Brake hard in straight line .Realease softly the brake pedal entering turn.Control your car's rotation using trail braking till the apex. This is so much rewarding and fun. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°° I'm going to put a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track.

Jun 25, 2025
This McLaren has a similar pace to the Lamborghini Huracan Gr4, offering slightly more grip but slightly less top speed. In the end, their overall performance and behavior are quite comparable. The rear end carries low minimum downforce to improve front grip and eagerness. While this makes the car a bit sharp, it’s still easy and enjoyable to drive. You can find  "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr4 or Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Peugeot VGT Gr3 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This Gr.3 car under BOP rules is not one of the best Gr.3 cars. Its top speed is similar to the Peugeot RCZ Gr.3, but its front grip is inferior, even with maximum front downforce and minimum rear downforce. It’s approximately 0.8 seconds slower at Spa, for example. _________________________________________________________________________ This is the "Gr.3 BOP" section found in "Collections," near the Home Page button. These cars race under BOP (Balance of Performance) rules—only power and weight are regulated—but with fully open tuning settings. BOP ensures fair performance across all Gr.3 cars. You’ll be able to tune the suspension, differential, downforce, gearbox, and brake balance.However, for track-specific optimization, you’ll mainly adjust gear ratios and downforce. Important: Keep front and rear downforce values equal to maintain proper balance. The suspension and differential settings provided are solid for all types of tracks. Enjoy your drive,><((((((°>°°°°°°

It's not a top-tier car in its class, but it still achieves a lap time of 2:17 at Spa with exceptional grip and drivability. Low fuel consumption is an advantage, but it cannot compete in the Le Mans event due to its use of Sport Soft tires (only Racing tires are allowed). 700PPGr1Le MansMRMazdaSPAsuzuka
Suzuki Jimny XC '18 - 4WD - 450PP - Comfort Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** NORMAL Body Size "16 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide Front St - Side B - Rear St It’s a very fun little car with a un 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** NORMAL BodySize "16 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront St - Side B - Rear St It’s a very fun little car with a unique driving character. It responds exceptionally well to both braking and steering inputs with a huge front grip under brake entering any turn, making it really engaging to drive. With some practice, you can use its behavior to your advantage when entering any kind of corner—slow or fast. Once you get the feel for it, it really helps you improve your corner entry, mid-corner control, and exit. I especially love driving 450PP cars on Brands Hatch and Tsukuba—they're a perfect match. The current gearbox setup also works fine for the Nordschleife, though you might want to shorten it a bit for slower tracks. "Note: The brake balance in this game feels completely off. Typically, brake balance has minimal impact on a car's handling response. However, for this specific car, the behavior is reversed. A +5 setting, which should theoretically make the car more aggressive (with a rear-biased brake balance), produces the opposite effect, resulting in a softer response under braking and allowing for greater steering angle." Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
450PP4WDSuzuki
Suzuki Jimny Sierra JC '18 - 4WD - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP : K24A-Civic (Garage RCR Civic) Wide BodySize "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side B - Rear B Dominant 500PP Car (with PP Bug) You can race this car on Tokyo rainy event against the best 600PP cars. Easy win.This car punches well above its class—capable of competing with the best 600PP builds in the game. It delivers excellent top speed, a neutral balance, and surprisingly strong grip even on Sport Hard tires. Stick closely to the ideal racing line, and the car will reward you with impressive pace on almost any track. Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD5 STARS500PPBrands HatchNordschleifeSWAPSuzukiTokyo
Nissan GT-R NISMO '17 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 21, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Egine SWAP : 8.0-WR16-64v4T-Chiron (Bugatti Chiron) Wide body Rims 22" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom "It matches the pace of the R34 SWAP on Spa, a strong benchmark, lapping in the 2:04s. The R34 has better acceleration, but this car is heavier due to the Chiron engine's substantial weight. Personally, I prefer the original for this 800PP level, as it’s 400 lbs lighter and offers superior grip. Its handling is perfectly stable with exceptional front-end precision, remarkable for a 4WD car. It’s also easy to drive, making it a joy on the Nordschleife, where it can achieve a sub-6:00 lap time. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD5 STARS800PPNissanNordschleife
Mazda 787B '91 - MR - 900PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 21, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** One of the fastest race cars on Spa. It performs flawlessly on any track, in any condition. I use a long first gear to improve throttle control out of slow corners. The power builds smoothly, peaking at high RPMs until it hits the limiter. It’s a perfect drive, making it easy to lead.Enjoy you drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
5 STARS900PPGr1MRMazdaNordschleifeSPAwatkins Glen
Nissan GT-R NISMO '17 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Nordschleife - 1.59
Jun 20, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body Rims 20" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side St - Rear A - Wing A This is my fastest 800PP road car on the Nordschleife, lapping at 5:57 in my hands. It matches the pace of the Nissan R34 and Lamborghini Aventador LP 750, but with slightly more grip. The car has an excellent driving line and remains steady in any situation. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS800PPNissanNordschleife
Renault Clio V6 23V '00 - MR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing B Medium Performance, Exceptional Driving Experience This car offers medium performance, lapping 7:14 in my hands, about 2 seconds slower than the Lancia Stratos. However, the real charm lies in the driving experience. It’s a true MR car, reacting exactly as you’d expect. The rear slides naturally to the ideal slip angle, while the precision at the wheel allows you to perfectly place the front end. It’s an excellent car for learning how to drive MR cars very fast and stay right on the edge. I absolutely love it on tracks like Brands Hatch, Nordschleife, or any technical circuit. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPMRNordschleifeRenault
Mazda RX500 '70 - MR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 16" - rims width wide - Offset wide This car can compete with any other strong 550PP contender without issue, but in my opinion, that's not its only advantage. I've given it four stars for one key reason: its exceptional responsiveness. The car reacts precisely to every driving input, delivers excellent top speed, and maintains a very linear power curve that peaks at high RPM. However, you shouldn't overdrive it, and be aware that the brakes aren't particularly strong. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
550PPMRMazda
Porsche 911 GT3 RS (992) '22 - RR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.59
Jun 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Standard wheel - Rims size 21" 22" - Rim Width St - Offset StPerfect car with tons of grip with flawless handling. Top speed is limited by the fixed front and rear downforce levels. This Porsche could easily earn a 5-star rating, but its restricted top speed keeps it from hitting sub-6:30 lap times (It's 6:33 in my hands), which is one of the criteria for that label in my garage on this track. Aside from that, it's a phenomenal driving machine. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
700PPNordschleifePorscheRR
Ford Mustang - Gr3 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is a fast Gr.3 car at this level, it could be one of the quickest Gr.3 cars on Daytona. However, MR (mid-rear) cars have better traction, which is crucial on this track. It’s an easy car to drive, grippy, with superior top speed. It also performs well on technical tracks and is perfect for the Spa 1-hour event. Just be careful of wheelspin out of slow corners in 1st gear. Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
800PPFRFordGr3
Toyota FT-1 VGT (Gr.3) - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Sardegna event - 1.59
Jun 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Lap times: High 1:36s, low 1:37s consistently for 5 laps at Fuel Map 1 (FM1) with short shifting, then pitting for f 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Lap times: High 1:36s, low 1:37s consistently for 5 laps at Fuel Map 1 (FM1) with short shifting, then pitting for fuel and tires. This is a very strong car for leading races, but be careful with its peaky power delivery—it causes aggressive wheelspin when the turbo kicks in, making it tricky to control. To manage this, I set a low acceleration differential and used short shifting to save fuel over the 5-lap stint. This also helps reduce wheelspin, improving stability under acceleration. Enjoy your drive.><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE: MDYA-911 (Porsche 992 911 GT3 RS '22) Wide car Rims "21 - Rims width ST - Offset St Front A - Side A - Rear A - Wing custom This swapped Porsche 992 engine is better than the Windsor 351 Maverick engine. The new physics require a completely different tune. It’s a very fast, high-performing car, capable of lapping 2:07 at Spa with excellent stability and grip. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims 19" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Wing CUSTOM The top speed is decent, not exceptionally fast, but the handling and grip are truly outstanding, delivering incredible driving pleasure through the bends throughout the entire race. 600PPFerrariMRTokyo
Ford Mustang Mach 1 '71 - FR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 12, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Normal original Body Rims "15 - Rim Width Wide - Offset wide Front A - Wing A I tested this car at 700PP with a SWAP engine and at 600PP with a grip-focused setup for the Nordschleife—even on Tokyo Expressway—but I wasn’t satisfied at all with its performance, handling, or overall behavior. It felt just average. However, at 550PP, this car reveals all its secrets. The performance is excellent, wheelspin is controllable, and the handling is wonderful. I love driving it at Brands Hatch or the Nordschleife; you can feel incredible precision in the steering and cornering lines. Above all, the cockpit view is truly superior, with a gorgeous 70s-style dashboard and a wide, unobstructed field of vision. You can push it hard in this view with ease. The brakes are the only real weak point of this car. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mini Cooper S '05 - FF - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body - Size "16 - Rims width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Side St - Wing St 500PP is the limit for this car. Even at 550PP, it shows some slight wheelspin. In my opinion, an engine swap with more power is irrelevant. I really dislike when an FF car has an erratic driving line, perhaps they'll fix these weird behaviors in GT8 or GT9... i don't know. At this level, though, it's a very good car: pleasant, responsive, and competitive against any other 500PP road car. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
500PPFFMini
Suzuki Cappuccino '91 - FR - 400PP - Comfort Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 10, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide body Rims 14" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing A Perfect for Lightweight Cup and 400PP RacesThis car is ideal for the Lightweight Cup or any 400PP race, offering perfect balance and great performance. Just remember: you can't use an automatic gearbox with this car. The power peaks in the mid-range RPM, so you’ll need to shift early, around 7,500 RPM, to stay in the optimal power band. The gearbox may seem unusually long for this car, but that’s not actually the case. Enjoy your drive . ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
400PP5 STARSFRSuzuki
Toyota GR010 Hybrid '21 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - Sardegna - 1.59
Jun 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** It's not the fastest car for an 800PP race, but it offers superior handling and grip. With this setup, you can complete the race with just one pit stop for fuel and tires, consistently lapping in the low 1:35s. It also works well for the Spa 1-hour race, while its top speed is modest, its exceptional grip and cornering ability make it a joy to drive through the bends. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
800PPGr1MRSPASardegnaToyota
Dodge SRT Hellcat '15 - FR - NASCAR - Racing Hard Tires - Daytona - 1.59
Jun 9, 2025
Wide car. Rims 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing Custom All my NASCAR setups have identical performance, same top speed, acceleration, and roughly the same grip. You can race any car online in a lobby or offline in custom races just the way you like. This collection includes a sample room setting for reference. Just make sure to set the correct gearbox and downforce. The suspension is up to you, but I think it works well as is. It’s even more fun than I expected! Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota 2000GT '67 - FR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 8, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims "15 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Rear Wing : Standard This is a wingless setup, designed to make the car highly drivable with neutral balance and predictable handling. It wasn’t an easy task, but I believe I’ve nailed it. You can push it confidently on any track, smooth, controlled, and consistently fast, without needing to overdrive it. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Honda S2000 '99 - FR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.59
Jun 8, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Car. Rims 16" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing Custom New 5 stars setup.This is a fantastic car, offering perfect balance and excellent handling. It performs exceptionally well in the 550PP Clubman Cup across any track, from High Speed Ring to Tsukuba. I absolutely love driving it at this level. However, it doesn’t feel as refined at 600PP. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota Tundra TRD Pro '19 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 7, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine model: Demon-Challenger (Dodge Challenger SRT Demon '18) IT'S NOT A Wide Body car ORIGINAL WHEEL Rims "18 / Ri 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine model: Demon-Challenger (Dodge Challenger SRT Demon '18)IT'S NOT A Wide Body carORIGINAL WHEEL Rims "18 / Rim width St / Offset Wide Front B - Side A - Rear A I didn’t use the wide-body option for this car because it seems to interfere too much with its performance. This Challenger’s engine has a PP (Performance Points) bug that allows it to support 1,186 HP while staying at 700PP. Thanks to this—along with a well-tuned suspension to handle all that power—it delivers exceptional performance, achieving lap times of 2:16 at Spa and 6:30 on the Nordschleife. I didn’t give it a 5-star rating because the handling is merely good, not outstanding. The lack of downforce makes it harder to control this heavy car at its limits, but it remains relatively stable. Just avoid pushing it too hard over curbs. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD700PPNordschleifeSPASWAPToyota
BMW M3 '89 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 7, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP Suzuki V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 (Suzuki Vision GT Gr.3) Wide car Rims "15 - Width wide - Offfset Wide Front B - Side A - Rear A - Wing Custom Much Improved Since the 1.55 Physics UpdateThis car has become a far better performer since the 1.55 physics update. I'm now running it with Racing Medium tires, still offering solid power and top speed, but with significantly improved grip and a much better overall balance. The driving sensation is excellent: precise, responsive, and fast, ideal for any technical track. The Suzuki Gr.3 engine screams beautifully and, surprisingly, has low fuel consumption (I still don’t understand why, in GT, racing engines are often more fuel-efficient than road car engines!). Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Audi TTS Coupé '14 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Nordschleife - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 6, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: BYH-R8 Wide car Rims "19 - Offset Wide - Rims wide -Front A - Side A - Wing Custom This car is very fast on the Nordschleife, lapping close to 6:30. It has a slightly higher top speed than the Mitsubishi Lancer III and delivers a similar level of grip. However, the handling is only decent—a mild understeer tendency remains, and correcting it would require sacrificing too much PP. In comparison, the Mazda 3 offers better overall drivability, which is why it earns a full 5-star rating in my book. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°° Base Performance Engine Model: BYH-R8 / BYH-RBDrivetrain: 4WD (Four-Wheel Drive)Aspiration: Turbocharged (TC)Displacement: 4163 ccMax Power: 585 HP @ 8700 rpmMax Torque: 373.8 ft-lb @ 8100 rpmWeight: 2652 lbsFront-Rear Weight Balance: 55 : 45 Acceleration Performance 0-400 m: 10.80 sec0-1000 m: 19.22 sec100-150 km/h: 2.22 sec Handling & Stability Stability: -0.32 (Neutral)Rotational G-Force:60 km/h: 1.29 G120 km/h: 1.35 G240 km/h: 1.46 GHigh-Speed Behavior: -1.00 (Inflat/Inten) Tuning & Setup (700PP All-Track Configuration) Tires: Racing Hard (Front/Rear)Suspension: Fully CustomizedECU: Full Control ComputerPower Restrictor: 100%Ballast: 75 lbs, Position 50Transmission: Fully Customizable RacingTop Speed: 270 km/h (Automatically Adjusted)Gear Ratios:1st: 2.735 / 120 km/h2nd: 2.058 / 160 km/h3rd: 1.603 / 205 km/h4th: 1.314 / 251 km/h5th: 0.991 / 340 km/h

Suzuki V6 Escudo Pikes Peak SP '98 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Sardegna - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE: Suzuki V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 (Suzuki Vision GT Gr.3)Rims 17" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Performant car but the original engine is faster. For Sardegna, use fuel modes 4 to 5 to manage five laps, requiring two stops for fuel and tires. It delivers consistent lap times of 1:31, with superior grip and excellent braking performance. While the handling is solid—fast and safe—it lacks precision, and I couldn't correct some of its behaviors. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Ferrari 458 Italia '09 - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body- Size "21 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide-Front A - Wing Custom This is an exceptional car, a true driver’s machine, offering remarkable precision and responding flawlessly to all inputs. However, it falls short of being a top-tier 700PP car. While it boasts superior grip, its top speed is merely adequate, achieving a 2:17 lap time at Spa. With a bit more top speed, it could easily earn a five-star rating. Nevertheless, the driving experience is fantastic, which, in my opinion, is what matters most. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°°°

Suzuki V6 Escudo Pikes Peak SP '98 - 4WD - 600PP - Comfort medium tires - Tokyo event - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP : Suzuki V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 (Suzuki Vision GT Gr.3) Rims up "17 - Width Wide - Offset Wide This car posted a lap time of 2:04 in standard conditions and 2:03 at its peak performance in my hands, requiring only one stop for fuel. The car struggles with grip at low speeds, but as velocity increases, grip improves significantly, providing excellent stability through medium and high-speed corners. The engine swap results in a less peaky power delivery compared to the original, though you’ll still need to keep the RPMs high. Power begins to drop off above 10,000 RPM. It’s a technical car to drive, demanding precise timing to hit the apex accurately. The car responds sharply to all inputs—steering, throttle, and braking—requiring careful modulation to align perfectly with the apex of a turn. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD600PPSWAPSuzukiTokyo
Jaguar XJR-9 '88 - Gr1 - MR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - Sardegna - 1.59
Jun 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** One-stop strategy, targeting lap times of 1:29 to 1:30. The car is exceptionally fast, utilizing extended first and second gears to minimize wheel spin, with power delivery peaking at high RPM. To manage fuel consumption over an 8-lap stint, use Fuel Mode 2 or 3 rather than short-shifting. The car performs well in the Spa 1H event, consistently lapping at 2:02. It’s stable and neutrally balanced, with front ballast added to enhance power for the 800PP class. While front grip is solid, reducing ballast or front downforce could improve it further, though this would sacrifice power to maintain the PP level. This setup offers the best balance of speed and grip I’ve found. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mazda Roadster TC - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - Le Mans - SWAP - 1.59
Jun 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE : R26B-787B -Size "19 -Wing Custom This 'All Track' setup is perfectly tailored for the Le Mans event. Its highly efficient racing engine delivers exceptional fuel economy, enabling three full-throttle laps without compromise. The car consistently clocks 3:55 lap times with remarkable stability. Opting for Racing Hard tires and a power boost is possible, but the current configuration strikes an ideal balance, offering superior grip and a smooth, controlled drive with outstanding top speed. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota 86 GrB Rally Car - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Very Performant 700PP Tarmac Setup. A performant car for all types of tracks, also very effective in the Le Mans event thanks to its low fuel consumption. The long gearbox is tuned specifically for Le Mans, keeping the engine in mid-RPM range during long straights to save fuel. Like all Gr.B Rally cars, it has a lot of rotation, so avoid braking hard while applying too much steering input, or it will spin instantly. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Normal Car. (Not a wide car) Rims 12" - rims width wide - Offset St Front B - Rear B - Wing A A performant 400PP car, with this power level, there's no wheel spin issue. Ferrari 812 Superfast '17 - FR - 900PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
Jun 1, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Body Rims "20 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Rear A - Wing A Maxed Setup – Pure Driving Pleasure This setup doesn’t quite reach the 900PP limit, but it unlocks the car’s full potential as a fantastic machine to drive. With superior grip, sharp responsiveness, and a perfectly steady line, it feels effortless to push this car to its limit on any track, from Nordschleife and Spa to Le Mans and Daytona. While it may not top the charts in strict PP-restricted races, its exceptional driving dynamics more than make up for it. In open events with no PP constraints, where you’re free from compromise, this car reveals its wild, thrilling nature. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

It delivers outstanding grip, speed, and handling, while remaining easy to drive at a fast pace—making it an ideal choice for both beginners and experienced drivers. Perfect for technical circuits like the Nordschleife, it’s also a strong contender in online lobbies, especially when racing in tight, competitive packs. A truly reliable and rewarding car. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims 19" - Width Standard - Offset Standard Front St - Side St - Rear St - Wing St Special setup for the Porsche Cup events. This car doesn’t use any custom aerodynamic parts, preserving its wonderful original look. I already have 700PP and 800PP versions using the swap engine, which offers very low fuel consumption and strong performance. It has excellent grip, supports an aggressive driving style, and is very competitive on any track , all while maintaining a superior top speed. Enjoy your drive . ><(((((°>°°°°°°

May 31, 2025
Wide carRims size up to youWidth wideOffset wideFront A - Rear A - Wing A This is my fastest 500PP road car on the Nordschleife , a fantastic machine, very stable with tons of grip and a perfect driving line. 5 STARS500PPAlfa RomeoFRNordschleife
Audi TT Cup '16 Gr4 - FF - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 30, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Similar drive as the Peugeot RCZ Gr4, this setup pushes the car to its power limit without causing wheel spin under acceleration. It remains very steady and performs well, though some other 4WD Gr.4 cars offer better traction when exiting slow corners. That said, it’s a pleasant and rewarding drive, offering great precision at the wheel—definitely a better overall experience than most FF Gr.4 cars I’ve tested so far. It's a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr4 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE: Honda SE75E-2&4 (Honda 2&4) Wide car Rims size "12 Front St - Wing A This car has several unusual issues with its chassis, making it challenging to find an ideal setup. After some tuning, I’ve achieved a balanced configuration that performs well. Avoid increasing the power, as it could lead to disastrous results. It can compete with any top-tier 500PP car on any track, but you must drive carefully to avoid overpushing it. Steer clear of grass, as the brakes are quite weak—pay close attention to your braking points. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** - Size "15- Rims width St - Offset wide ( Originals wheels) Very Good Old PorscheThis classic Porsche doesn’t have any downforce options, but it’s impressively well-balanced and responsive. It’s not the easiest car to drive at the limit, but if you stay smooth and avoid overdriving, it rewards you with speed and stability. You don’t need all the engine tuning parts—I initially used them to test a 550PP setup, but it wasn’t a great option overall. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** - Rims Size "15 A very well-rounded car, you can definitely race it at Le Mans, but it also performs impressively on tracks like Spa, Suzuka, and the Nordschleife. Chevrolet Corvette (C1) '58 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium/Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.59
May 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : LT5-Corvette-C7 (Chevrolet Corvette C7 ZR1) Wide Body Rims '15 -Rim Width Wide - Offset WideParts:Front St - Rear B My goal with this car was to make it drivabled, despite having no downforce options and over 1000HP under the hood. Surprisingly, it turned out to be very stable and well-behaved. It delivers amazing speed and handles impressively well. I had to use mixed tire compounds, harder ones at the front, to achieve a balanced setup, and that made all the difference. It’s extremely fast everywhere, lapping 2:15 at Spa, for example. The only drawback is for Le Mans event lovers: you can only manage 2 laps, and it’s not possible to change tires while keeping this exact configuration. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°
700PPChevroletFRNordschleifeSPASWAP
Ferrari 458 Italia GT3 '13 - MR - Gr3 - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 25, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Almost as fast as the Audi R8 EVO Gr.3, this is one of the top-performing Gr.3 cars at 800PP. The performance is excellent across the board. For Daytona, you can run 400 front / 700 rear downforce to improve top speed. If you're targeting the WTC800 10-lap, 1-stop race, you'll need to use medium tires,softs only last about 4 laps. On Spa, it laps at 2:06 with full downforce, offering superior grip and handling. The biggest challenge in setting this car up was dealing with excessive pivot, which made it difficult to hold a clean driving line. I solved this by using maximum initial torque and braking sensitivity in the differential settings, it works perfectly. Enjoy your drive.><(((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS800PPDaytonaFerrariGr3MRNordschleifeSPA
Chaparral 2J '70 - MR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 25, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Top-Tier 800PP Race Car – Fast, Grippy, and a Joy to Drive This is a top race car at 800PP, capable of lapping 2:04 on SPA. On Sardegna, fuel consumption is higher than other race cars, requiring two stops with Fuel Mode 3, but it remains highly competitive. The driving experience is fantastic, with superior braking power, even with a 100kg ballast. The car is extremely grippy and easy to handle, making it a joy to drive. I tested several setups: More ballast with more power – stable but less responsive.No ballast – extremely fast in corners but lacking straight-line speed. In the end, I settled on this setup, and I’m absolutely in love with it. This car is definitely a keeper! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS800PPGr1MRMazdaSPAsuzuka
Ferrari FXX-K '14 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft tires - All Track - 1.59
May 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****-Size "19 & "20 - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide A solid all-around car with good grip, but it needed some tuning to handle properly. I had to tighten the suspension using stiffer springs, as the car tends to bottom out easily with softer setups. The differential feels a bit odd, it tends to lock up quickly regardless of the settings, which limits fine-tuning options. Another limitation is the fixed downforce and automatic DRS, which restrict top speed. Personally, I’d prefer the ability to adjust those parameters manually to fine-tune the balance the way I like. Overall performance is good but not exceptional. Lap times like low 2:07s at Spa and 1:34 at Daytona Road are decent, but not quite at the level of the top-tier 800PP builds. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

McLaren MP4-12C '10 - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Car. Rims 19" & 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Wing Custom An extremely fast car, stable, grippy, and delivers excellent driving pleasure. I’m lapping low 2:17s on Spa with it, and it performs just as well on the Nordschleife. It also boasts superior top speed, but it’s not suitable for the Le Mans event due to its very high fuel consumption. Even with Fuel Map 6, you’ll only get 2 laps per stint, so fuel strategy becomes a major limitation. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS700PPMRMcLaren
GAC Maverick - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Rims size 19" & 20"- Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Wing Standard It’s not easy to dial in a good balance for this car due to the lack of downforce adjustment options. The only truly effective tuning tool here is the ballast setting. After extensive testing, I found that adding 108 kg to the rear significantly improves the car’s overall balance and helps reduce wheel spin—especially important with its 900HP and high torque. There’s still a slight hint of understeer that I couldn’t fully eliminate, even after trying some extreme settings. That said, it remains manageable and doesn’t compromise drivability too much. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3 '18 - Gr3 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** My fastest Gr.3 BOP setup so far. It has similar top speed to most others, but offers a bit more grip for better overall performance. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

600PPMRMcLarenTokyo
Peugeot RCZ Gr3 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 20, 2025
This car has superior grip, which is why I’ve set the downforce to the minimum.It still maintains good cornering ability, but this setup favors top speed—making it ideal for tracks like Spa or the Nordschleife, where you need both grip through technical sections and strong performance on the straights. In the end, this is the best compromise. If you're racing on a tighter, more technical track with fewer straights, you can increase downforce. Just make sure to add the same amount to both front and rear to maintain balance—adjust until it feels right for you. _________________________________________________________________________ This is the "Gr.3 BOP" section found in "Collections," near the Home Page button. These cars race under BOP (Balance of Performance) rules—only power and weight are regulated—but with fully open tuning settings. BOP ensures fair performance across all Gr.3 cars. You’ll be able to tune the suspension, differential, downforce, gearbox, and brake balance.However, for track-specific optimization, you’ll mainly adjust gear ratios and downforce. Important: Keep front and rear downforce values equal to maintain proper balance. The suspension and differential settings provided are solid for all types of tracks. Enjoy your drive,><((((((°>°°°°°°
BOPGr3MRPeugeot
Porsche 911 RSR (991) '17 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Norddschleife - 1.59
May 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Specific Nordschleife setup. My goal with this car was to prioritize front-end grip and overall stability. I’ve used 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Specific Nordschleife setup.My goal with this car was to prioritize front-end grip and overall stability. I’ve used a low ride height and set the spring stiffness as low as possible to favor top speed, even with the added downforce, this allows the car to reach good speed on the straights. I also reduced the differential acceleration to make the car more manageable out of slow corners, while tightening the deceleration setting to help stabilize the rear during fast transitions and quick steering inputs. The Nordschleife is all about kerbs and rapid sequences of turns, you need confidence to maintain a fast, consistent pace. This setup runs close to 6 minutes in my hands. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Lamborghini Aventador LP 750-4-SV '15 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 19, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP *****Wide CarRims 20" & 21"- Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side A - Wing Custom One of the very best 700PP road cars using the original engine. It’s a fantastic all-around performer—excellent grip, speed, and handling—while being easy to drive fast. A perfect choice for Nordschleife or any technical track. It’s also one of the top picks for online racing, especially when dealing with aggressive packs of racers. Both the 750 and 700 Aventador versions have nearly identical pace and driving characteristics. Note: You don't need to add any engine tuning parts—I'm using the 800PP engine for this 700PP build. That's why it's already performing at this level. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

700PPLe MansMRRadicalSWAP
Re Amemiya FD3S RX-7 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 16, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims "17 Wing Custom The handling of this car is simply perfect, offering excellent driving pleasure. Unfortunately, it feels somewhat nerfed, lacking sufficient top speed and acceleration. It laps the Nordschleife in 7:15, while most high-performing 600PP cars run around 7:11, and the very best manage 7:05. The gearbox feels very long, but keep in mind that you need to shift at 7,500 RPM, where the power curve ends. After that, performance drops off significantly. Also, note that I’m using Sport brakes, not Racing brakes. They’re already very effective and allow for a bit more power allocation within the 600PP limit. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
600PPFRNordschleifeRe Amemiya
Re Amemiya FD3S RX-7 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 16, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine Swap : LS7-Rampage (Roadster Shop Rampage) Rims "18 Wing St I did my best to make this car enjoyable to drive. Performance is just decent, you need to use medium tires to get good grip and handling. Hard tires don’t offer the same control and can make the car feel unpredictable. It easily exceeds available grip if you overdrive it, and that doesn’t make for a pleasant driving experience. If I remember correctly, the 600PP setup was actually more performant on the Nordschleife. I’ll revisit it soon. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPFRRe AmemiyaSWAP
Chevrolet Z06 (C5) '01 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 16, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims "17 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side B - Rear B - Wing B Still excellent in handling and balance, just like the 700PP tune, but now lighter, which adds a lot more agility, especially with the rear Part B diffuser installed. Paired with soft compound tires, the grip is impressive, stable, responsive, and easy to drive. However, it’s hard to manage wheel spin out of slow corners due to the massive torque and relatively light chassis, with a front-rear weight balance of 47/53. If you struggle with throttle control, consider setting traction control to 1 or 2. On Daytona, for example, the car performs very well, but you can lose time exiting the four slow corners. Also, be careful not to jump on the brakes with too much steering input or brake too late, the car can become unstable. Overall, an excellent all-around car. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
800PPChevroletFR
Chevrolet Z06 (C5) '01 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 16, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims "17 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side B - Rear A - Wing A Excellent handling and balance. I had to make the car heavier than I wanted because reducing the weight too much lowers the power too severely for the 700PP level. This setup is the best compromise I’ve found , it’s almost on pace with the Porsche 911 '16, which is always a solid benchmark. At Le Mans, fuel consumption is high. It’s difficult to manage 3-lap stints, even when using fuel map 6 and short shifting. For fans of that event, you might consider reducing the weight further by applying more weight reduction stages, then lowering the power to improve fuel efficiency. It’s an excellent car for the Nordschleife, where I’m lapping around 6:35. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPChevroletFR
Ferrari 812 Superfast '17 - FR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.59
May 15, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims "20 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Rear A - Wing A The stock setup is horrible to drive, there’s a lot of understeer and the weight transfer feels unnatural. If I were Ferrari’s boss, I’d be furious with Polyphony Digital for turning this wonderful machine into a lumbering beef cart. At 800PP with Racing Hard tires, it’s at a clear disadvantage; other cars at this level, like the Porsche 911, are running Racing Softs and pushing more power. What a shame. Luckily, I managed to recover the chassis balance and fine-tune the suspension. Now it drives beautifully, the only issue left is performance. It’s still a bit nerfed. For example, on Spa it’s about 3 seconds slower than the top 800PP supercars in the game. I tested it in the Sardegna event, and it performed great there. It's a winning car if you run fuel map 6 and short shift for a two-stop race. Also very solid on the Nordschleife. Please, Ferrari boss, ask Polyphony to hire me before releasing another car in this game. Just to be sure. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
800PPFRFerrari
Alpine A110 '17 - MR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 15, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Car. Rims 18" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Custom Matches the pace of the very best 600PP road cars on the Nordschleife, lapping around 7:06 in my hands—comparable to the Jaguar F-Type R '14, Audi TTS Coupé '09, and Toyota Celica GT-Four '94. Handling is superb, with good top speed and a stable, predictable character. It's a safe car, easy to control even when pushing hard. The setup is neutral, with no rake and no surprises in any condition. Of course, if you overdrive it and push beyond the limit, you’ll be punished. For online racing against aggressive drivers, a 4WD option like the Toyota Celica or Audi TTS is a better choice. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

May 14, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine swap : Suzuki V8-Suzuki-VGT-Gr.3 (Suzuki Vision GT Gr.3) Rims 19" & 20" Rear : Wing I’ve raised this car to a 5-star rating , its performance is excellent. It laps 2:15 at Spa and goes under 6:30 on the Nordschleife. On Le Mans, it's only medium in performance , the Gr.3 engine, when maxed out at over 780 HP, doesn't offer great fuel efficiency. That said, it delivers tons of grip, excellent top speed, and very good handling. Just don’t overdrive it or brake too late when entering turns. The setup is sharp: I’ve locked the deceleration differential, but the car can still lose some rear grip with excessive rotation. It’s nothing dramatic , you won’t lose the car, just a bit of time. I really enjoy driving it on technical tracks , it’s a fantastic machine when handled properly. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide carRims size "16 - Width wide - Offset wideFront A - Side A - Rear B Challenging Setup Balanced with Front Ballast Balanced and Competitive at 550PP – But the Swap Is a No-Go (For Now) I’ve found a very narrow sweet spot for this car. Unfortunately, the lack of downforce options limits it to this specific power range. I tried everything to make the swap engine work at 700PP , mixed compound tires, heavy front ballast, extreme suspension settings , but nothing delivered satisfying results. For now, the swap version will be collecting dust. However, with this current setup, the car feels balanced and responsive. It’s competitive against any top-tier 550PP car, whether you're taking it to the Nordschleife or other technical tracks. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

May 12, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP : 1LR-GUE-LFA (Lexus LFA '10) Rims "17 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side A - Rear B - Wing A Fantastic High-Screaming Engine Sound – Now Even Better with 1.55 Physics This van features a thrilling, high-revving engine sound that elevates the driving experience. The latest update removes the need for ballast, making the car more agile and increasing front-end grip. Thanks to post-1.55 physics, the chassis feels much freer and more responsive through all four corners. Although its top speed is limited by a poor drag coefficient (Cx), the car more than makes up for it with incredible grip and razor-sharp handling. It’s arguably one of the fastest cars through the bends—like piloting a giant go-kart. Every corner becomes a joy to attack. Despite its limitations on the straights, it still laps under 6:30 on the Nordschleife and clocks a 2:16 at Spa. Absolutely amazing! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims Diam "19 - Rim Width Wide -Front B - Side B - Rear B - Wing B Another car i've spent a lot of time to found an acceptable setup. The result is not perfect , i did my best. When maxed this car is overpowered and even using maximum values for mains suspensions settings, you can feel some strange reactions. When you check your replays on Nordschleife for example, you can also see yours wheels shaking sometime..... weird. Anyway , the result is acceptable as i say before, on SPA it's 2:07 and 6:05 on Nordschleife in my hands. Same as most top 800PP of my garage. Of course on Nordschleife it's a bit wild, also because the downforce are not as high as the others Lamborghini or others supercars. Lambo Aventador LP 700 have a rear downforce at 400 points Lambo Aventador LP 750 have a rear downforce at 450 Ferrari F8 tributo have a rear downforce at 500 La ferrari have a rear downforce at 600...... This Gallardo have a rear downforce at 330 only. I think they could install another more performant rear part, or another wing available..... but this is what it is. It's still a good car. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°°

Porsche 911 GT3 (996) '01 - RR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing B I removed the rear Part A diffuser from this car because, after the latest update, it needed more power and speed to keep pace with other fast and grippy 700PP road cars. Despite this change, the car still maintains good grip and now features a new weight balance of 38/62. It behaves like a true classic Porsche , lively at the rear, with a sharp and precise front end, exactly as a 100% Porsche should feel. Its performance is solid, though not at the top of the class. However, the handling is superb , stable, safe, and highly enjoyable to drive. It's a perfect match for the Nordschleife or any technical track. I also tested it at Le Mans, and the fuel consumption is manageable when using Fuel Mode 6. For that track, you could reduce some front downforce and add a bit more power , yet even as-is, it drives very well. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°

Nissan Silvia Qs (S13) '88 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
May 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** 😁👌Engine SWAP: SR20DET-Silvia-S15 (Nissan Silvia S15)Wide carRims "14 - Offset Wide - Rims wideFront A - Side A - Rear B - Wing B Silvia S15 SWAP – Neutral Balance, excelent Driving Experience The other Subaru BRZ SWAP option is almost undrivable. It has far too much power, which completely ruins the driving line and makes the car a nightmare to control. Honestly, it’s only usable on Route X, and even there, it’s not the fastest choice for fans of high-speed tracks. In contrast, the Silvia S15 SWAP feels perfectly matched. The power is well-balanced, delivering excellent driving behavior and a very enjoyable driving experience. I particularly love driving it in cockpit view—the sensations and steering response feel incredibly realistic. The only downside is the weak braking performance. Even though it’s a light car, the braking distances are noticeably longer than those of other road cars in the same range. With VR2, the experience is absolutely immersive. The engine sound is fantastic and really adds to the driving pleasure. While it may not be the absolute best in terms of lap times, it’s still very fast. Just for reference, it laps 4:05 on Le Mans using Fuel Map 4 or 5 for a 3-lap stint. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Aston Martin DBR9 GT1 '10 - Gr3 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 10, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** An excellent car—very fast, with superior top speed. On Daytona, it laps faster than some of the top Gr.3 cars like the McLaren '95 and Ford GT Race Car. The main challenge lies in managing the immense torque and wheel spin when exiting slow corners in 1st or 2nd gear. Power delivery is brutal at high RPM, but the very long 1st and 2nd gears help tame the acceleration and make it more controllable. Despite its power, the car is easy to drive, with excellent grip and outstanding straight-line speed. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

May 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Size "17 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide Tricky to Tune, but Highly Performant 550PP Road Car New setup using a revised 52/48 weight balance, achieved with a heavy ballast to allow for more power while keeping the car under 2000 lbs. I considered upgrading to a new engine and body, but at around 4,400,000 Cr, it was simply too expensive. I also skipped the racing brakes—the original ones are more than capable given the car’s low weight, and I chose to invest the saved PP into extra power instead. The result is a highly performant, easy-to-drive car with a stable line and excellent grip. It laps consistently around 7:33 to 7:35 in my hands, making it competitive with other top-tier 550PP road cars running standard engines. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body-Size "20 - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide-Front B - Side St - Rear A - Wing Custom An excellent car with strong performance, matching the pace of the Porsche 911 '16 at this level. It offers a neutral balance and safe, predictable handling, even with a heavier weight—thanks to its superior grip. While top speed is just decent and fuel consumption is relatively high, the car makes up for it with responsiveness and control. To get the most out of it, be sure to activate ANTI-LAG (Strong). This is essential when running the High RPM turbo, helping smooth out power delivery and maintain strong acceleration. The 7-speed gearbox is perfectly tuned to keep the engine in its power band, making the most of its torque and top-end pull. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Special Suzuka Tune – Maxed with Racing Soft Tires If you're experiencing traction issues or wheel spin out of slow corners, try setting Traction Control to 1. 4WD800PPGenesisGr1Sardegna
Nissan GT-R Gr4 - 4WD - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 5, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** This is a very fast and grippy car—among the quicker ones under BoP in the Gr.4 category. While all Gr.4 cars typically lap within about half a second of each other, 4WD models like this one are generally easier to push to the limit, especially in race conditions. Braking requires a bit of finesse. Under heavy braking, avoid applying too much steering input—doing so can cause the rear to step out. While this slide is usually easy to catch thanks to the car's stability, it’s not the fastest way through the corner. A better approach is to brake a bit earlier and modulate your braking pressure, focusing on keeping front-end grip and hitting the ideal line into the apex. Smooth inputs will reward you with consistent lap times and better tire wear over longer stints. This setup also works well in a max-power configuration, using a high-rpm turbo and maximum ECU output. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°° __________________________________________________________________________ I'm going to put a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track.

600PPLamborghiniMRTokyo
Ferrari 308 GTB '75 - MR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "15 / Rims width wide / Offset wide-Front A- Side St - Wing Custom The gearbox is tuned specifically for the Nordschleife, matching the pace of the Jaguar F Type R '14 with lap times around 7:08. For a mid-engine (MR) car, it’s surprisingly easy to drive and versatile. If you're racing on slower tracks, you’ll need to adjust the gearbox—just increase the final drive to suit those conditions. One key thing to note: don't lower the front ride height too much. While some might not like the higher stance, lowering it too much causes issues, like bottoming out or wheels touching the fenders—especially in areas like Foxhole on the Nordschleife or Eau Rouge at SPA. Maybe it’s fine on very flat tracks, but otherwise, you'll run into problems. I absolutely love driving this car on the Nordschleife—it’s a real pleasure. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Citroen GT Gr4 - MR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.58
May 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** A high-performing 700PP race car with a very stable and balanced drive, suitable for any track. You can complete 3 laps in the Le Mans event with some short shifting or by using fuel mode 2. Top drivers might prefer a more aggressive front end—this can be achieved by raising the rear ride height and/or lowering the rear downforce. However, doing so may require reducing power slightly, for example by setting the ECU to 99. Personally, with my driving style and skill level, I find the current setup ideal for regular races. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Lamborghini Murcielago LP 640 '09 - MR - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo - 1.58
May 3, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** -Wide body-Size "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front A - Wing Custom I'm using the original gearbox (with racing clutch and flywheel), standard brakes and pads (which are already very effective and help keep the PP lower), and the stock muffler , because I absolutely love the scream of this engine. In my opinion, it's one of the best in the game. The driving behavior is excellent: precise, grippy, and easy to place on the track. You can learn to exploit 100% of its potential within just a few laps. It also offers very good top speed , just above the field of the best race cars. You can lap consistently at 2:07 for a one-stop race. Driving this car is a real pleasure. The cockpit view is perfectly functional, and the engine sound inside is simply fantastic. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°

Audi VGT Gr1 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - Sardegna - 1.58
May 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is an outstanding VGT car—one of the best to drive. The grip and brakes are exceptional, and the top speed is competitive. However, I wish the KERS system were more efficient, like in the Toyota GR1 or Audi GR1 cars; it charges too slowly and runs out too quickly. To hit 800PP, I run a heavy ballast to maximize power, but even then, it still struggles slightly against the top-tier competition. That said, it’s an absolute joy to drive and performs brilliantly across a variety of tracks. If Polyphony tweaked the energy recovery just a bit, this could be a true monster! Enjoy your drive.><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: HR-414E-NSX (Honda NSX GT500 '16) Wide BodyRims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side A - Rear A - Wing A I’ve spent nearly a month fine-tuning this car, searching for the perfect setup. While not flawless, it’s still a highly competitive machine, capable of taking on top-tier 800PP road cars like the Porsche 911 and others. 700PPFRFordSWAP
Chevrolet Corvette ZR1 (C6) ’09 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
Apr 30, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP : 8.0-WR16-64v4T-Chiron (Bugatti Chiron) Wide Car. Rims 20" & 21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Side St - Rear A - Wing A This is the full downforce version of the build. The previous setup used the original wing and spoiler. To compare: on Daytona Road, both versions lap around 1:32. But on more technical tracks like Spa or the Nordschleife, the increased grip gives this setup a slight edge in performance. I’ve used Racing Soft tires to maximize grip on tight, technical sections, but you can switch to Mediums if you want to unlock more power. Even on Mediums, you’ll still get solid grip, and there’s a lot of untapped horsepower in this build. The Chiron engine, when fully maxed, can hit an insane 1850 HP and 1520 ft-lb of torque — this is a seriously wild swap. Performance Notes In terms of pace, it’s right up there with the top 800PP cars. Extremely grippy and stable. I added some rear ballast to shift the balance slightly — running 49/51 (front/rear) instead of the original 52/48. That slight change helps the front end feel lighter and more responsive on corner entry. The stock balance felt a bit sluggish to me. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** The car is now stable and performs well, but the lack of downforce makes it better suited for high-speed tracks. It’s extremely fast and has very low fuel consumption. Throw a fan in front of you for immersion, and watch out for virtual mosquitos at high speed! If there’s a weak point, it’s the brakes — not great by today’s standards. But these old bolids are insanely fast and thrilling to drive. Wnjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Standard wheelsRims "16 - Offset wide Challenging Stock, Now Perfect for WTC600 This car is difficult to drive in stock form—with skinny tires and no downforce, it’s challenging to set up. You have to keep it in line and avoid exceeding the grip; the balance is very narrow. I focused on longitudinal balance and tightening the lateral grip. I also refined the steering inputs, as any extreme wheel angle at a critical moment could throw off the driving line. Now, it’s drivable and performant, even on Nordschleife, as long as you don’t overdrive it. It’s ideal for any WTC600 race. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

F Here’s the strategy for the Tokyo event: 4 laps per stint with 2 stops for gas and tires.Use Fuel Mode 3 for most of the race, but switch to Mode 2 and Mode 1 on the long straight for maximum speed.Be mindful of rear tires on laps 4, 8, and 12. 800PPHondaMRSWAP
Subaru Impreza 22B STI '98 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
Apr 25, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine swap : EJ20-Impreza-Rally (Subaru Impreza Rally Car '99) -Wide body-Size "17 - Rims Width St - Offset wide-Front A - Side St - Wing Custom Thanks to a PP bug, this powerful swap engine allows for Racing Soft tires and full power while still fitting within the limit. There’s also plenty of room to adjust the downforce to achieve an optimal balance. I had to tighten the differential slightly to reduce excessive rotation. As expected, its performance is well above most other cars—comparable to a select few swap-engine monsters. It laps Spa in 2:11, giving you an idea of just how fast it is. Despite the power, the car remains steady and grippy, but avoid overdriving it—smooth inputs are key to getting the best out of this legendary machine. The current gearbox is set for medium-speed tracks. For high-speed circuits like Le Mans or Daytona, adjust the final gear to target a top speed of around 400 km/h. While that may sound high, keep in mind that peak power lies in the mid-RPM range. Check the full details below for the best results. ⚙️ Gearbox Setup: The gearing is extremely long due to the power curve.Peak power is at 5,500 RPM, so shift between 6,500 – 6,700 RPM for best performance.DO NOT rev to the limiter—you’ll lose a lot of speed.Automatic transmission won’t work well; using it will result in significantly lower performance. A true beast, but it demands proper shifting to unleash its full potential! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** THIS IS A NO SPOILER NO WING SETUP. ENGINE SWAP : 8.0-WR16-64v4T-Chiron (Bugatti Chiron) Wide Car. Rims 20" & 21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front St - Side St - Rear A - Wing St This is a NO SPOILER – ORIGINAL STANDARD WING setup.Despite the lack of added aero parts, the rear diffuser still provides enough grip to keep the car steady and planted. While there's slightly less downforce compared to a full aero build, this allows for a PP reduction of about 10 points, giving you room to add more power and still stay within the 800PP limit. The result is a very fast and perfectly drivable car—safe even when exiting slow corners, and matching the pace of the best 800PP road cars. I’ll be publishing another version soon with full downforce parts, offering more grip but less power to meet the same PP cap.Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

700PPChevroletFRNordschleife
Chevrolet Camaro Z28 '69 - FR - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
Apr 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: LT4-Camaro (Chevrolet Camaro ZL1 '18) -Wide body - Size "16-Rims width wide - Offset wide -Front B - Rear A- Wing Custom The LT4-Camaro engine delivers massive torque throughout the entire power curve. Be cautious of wheel spin, or simply run Traction Control at 1. That said, this is also a great opportunity to learn how to handle torque effectively—it’s well-distributed across the RPM range, allowing you to counter understeer out of fast corners. Despite the power, the car won’t easily lose the rear end, as the torque is strong yet progressive. The rear ballast plays a key role in controlling wheel spin by adding weight over the rear wheels. It also enhances front-end grip and steering precision, making the car more responsive to input. You can run the Le Mans event using Fuel Mode 6, with lap times around 4:05. Personally, I prefer this setup on technical tracks like the Nordschleife, but it’s entirely up to your driving style and preference. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims size '18 Front A - As bright as the sun. 😁 The Celica is displaying only a slight tendency for oversteer that’s easily managed with basic adjustments. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This setup pushes the car to its power limit without causing wheel spin under acceleration. It's a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr4 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

It’s incredibly easy to drive fast, offering strong grip and control. While fuel consumption isn’t ideal, it can still complete the Le Mans event using Fuel Mode 6 with short shifting. Its real strength shines on the Nürburgring Nordschleife, where it’s a joy to push hard and delivers sub-6:30 lap times. On Spa, it’s equally impressive, lapping at 2:16 in my hands. I’ve upgraded it to a 5-star rating—while the handling isn’t flawless, the overall performance and driving pleasure absolutely deserve the top score. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD5 STARS700PPNissan
Porsche 917 LVING LEGEND - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Great All-Rounder for Any Track This car performs well on all types of tracks. While it wasn’t specifically tuned for the Sardegna event, it still delivers solid performance and a smooth driving experience. It’s not a top-tier contender, but it’s definitely enjoyable to drive—lapping consistently at 1:33 over 5-lap stints with 2 stops. It also shines on Daytona, offering race car-level speed with the fuel efficiency of a road-going supercar—a rare combo in GT7. Additionally, it's very fast on Nordschleife and Spa, making it a versatile and capable machine across the board. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
800PPMRPorsche
Lamborghini V12 VGT - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 20, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This is the best I could achieve with this wonderful car. It delivers tons of grip, excellent braking, and good top speed—but like many VGT models, it’s held back by a few key limitations. There are no differential settings, and the stock clutch shifts slowly between gears. The gearbox is locked, and the gear ratios aren’t ideally spaced, so you’ll need to drive around that—managing both understeer on entry and oversteer on exit depending on your speed and throttle. On the plus side, traction is strong enough to avoid wheelspin, and with Racing Hard tires, grip stays solid throughout. That also gives you room to add more power and push the car right up to the 800PP limit. It laps 2:08 at Spa, and while it's great on technical tracks, it could use more top-end speed for Daytona. One final issue—the KERS system doesn’t function, and the charge just sits full and unusable. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°°
4WD800PPLamborghini
Mach Forty - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.58
Apr 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** - Rims Size "21 - Rim width Wide - Wing Custom Almost 5 stars , let's say 4.8 stars . The car is 6:30 on the Nordschleife , required time for 5 stars 700PP car , but the handling is not perfect. Almost perfect..... very good. Check the graph downthere. Remember that the peak power is at 6900 RPM , shift at 7500 RPM and the max power will be reached end of straight at +- 7000 RPM , to gain the maximum top speed. It's seems a very long gearbox ? It's not . it's just because you'll use the mid RPM range where the power is. Excelent car. Don't look like but it's a MR car . It means agility , a bit heavy , but move around on track very fast. Just like as a feline who eat a lot of McDonald... More or less ! Enjoy your drive. ><)))))))°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Wide carRims "18 - Rims width WideFront B - Side A - Rear St - Wing A This car was a request. While slightly nerfed for the 600PP class, it still laps around 7:10 on the Nordschleife—making it perfect for technical tracks. 600PPBMWFRNordschleife
Mercedes-Benz 190 E 2.5-16 EVO II '91 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
Apr 19, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP: M159-AMG-GT3-'20 Wide body car Rims size 17" - Rims width - Offset Wide Front A - Rear B - Wing Custom. Just a small 1.58 update to the 1.55 setup—someone mentioned there was a bit of understeer in certain situations, especially in fast corners. I’ve made a slight adjustment, and in my opinion, it’s now an even better car. I created a completely different setup for this car. Ballast didn’t work well, and I initially thought it was a suspension issue. It was, but adjusting the ride height solved the problem. The car now has less power but a lighter weight, which improves braking distance and grip. I also added higher front downforce to compensate for the minor rear ballast. The result is a car that’s slightly faster than my reference, the 911 '16, on SPA, and it laps Nordschleife at 6:32. While it’s just short of the 6:30 benchmark needed for a 5-star rating, it comes very close. Perfect for LE Mans too due to the GT3 engine. The handling is fantastic, with superior grip, and I’m thrilled to have found a way to elevate this wonderful car to a higher level. The cockpit view is excellent, making it an absolute joy to drive. It’s now a fantastic car to race with! Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPFRMercedesSWAP
Maserati A6GCS 53 Spyder '54 - FR - 600PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 18, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****- Size "17 / Rims width wide / Offset wide This is a high-performing 600PP car, ideal for racing tires at this level. It’s lightweight, very grippy, and features a neutral balance that makes it easy to handle—even when pushing it past the limit. You can drive it hard, but be cautious when approaching the edge of grip—especially avoid touching the grass. It’s a perfect fit for the WTC 600, which is currently the only offline event where you can properly race a car like this. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota Celica GT-FOUR RC (ST205) '95 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo - 1.58
Apr 18, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Front A - As bright as the sun. 😁 This is a very fast car for the Tokyo track, lapping consistently at 2:05 with one pit stop for fuel. It has a neutral balance and good grip, but it’s important to respect the limits of the front-end traction—push too hard, and understeer could send you into the wall, costing valuable tenths. It could have more grip, but that would come at the expense of top speed. As it stands, this setup offers the best performance balance for a rally-based car on this track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Original wheels -Size "16 -Front St - Side St - Wing St One of the fastest 500PP cars on the Nordschleife.I tuned it with a freer rear end and chose not to install racing brakes, which allowed me to add a bit more power. Despite that, braking performance remains solid. At this power level, it’s better to focus on maintaining flow rather than relying heavily on braking—it's harder to rebuild momentum in lower-powered cars. It laps the Nordschleife in around 7:54 in my hands. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** One of the fastest 950PP cars—excluding the two dominant 4WD Gr.1 cars (Mazda and Hyundai), which are around 1 to 2 seconds quicker at Spa, for example. The main challenge with this car is managing the wheel spin out of slow corners. With so much torque and power, it can be wild to handle. Personally, I use traction control to prevent losing control in those situations—it makes a big difference. That aside, the car offers superior grip and strong overall performance. In my hands, it's lapping 1:50 at Spa. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°

700PPFRMazdaNordschleife
🌟 A New Way to Support – If You Feel Like It! 🌟
Apr 14, 2025
I’ve added a new support tier for those of you who really enjoy the builds and feel like showing some extra love for the project. Nothing changes in terms of content — everyone gets access to the same posts, updates, and private community no matter which tier you're on. This new tier is just a simple way for anyone who truly appreciates the work and wants to support it a little more, out of gratitude or passion for tuning. It means the world to me to have your support — whether you're here for the cars, the process, or just the vibe. I'm genuinely happy to be able to do what I love and share it with such an awesome community. Thanks for riding with me — more builds coming soon! Cheers,Praiano63

Alpine A110 '72 - RR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - No Wing - 1.58
Apr 12, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Engine swap : SR20DET-Silvia-S15 (Nissan Silvia S15) -Wide body- Size "15 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front St - Wing Custom This is the "NO WING" option . An iconic rally car. I clearly remember watching it on TV during the Rallye de Monte Carlo when I was young—drifting at night, under the snow, on icy mountain roads. I even saw one in real life once in my hometown—such a small and low car, it looked like a toy. In-game, it can be tricky to handle due to some odd behavior, but I’m really happy with how this setup turned out. It’s very fast and genuinely enjoyable to drive—even through the technical high-speed sections of the Nordschleife. It’s also a strong performer, lapping close to 7:12 in my hands. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Ferrari Dino 246 GT '71 - MR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide carRims size "15 - Offset wideFront A - Rear A - Wing Custom Balanced and Drivable MR Car with Excellent Handling I'm using a sport muffler on this car because the racing ones sound terrible—like a vacuum cleaner.For this new setup, I opted for Sport Soft tires to address rear-end instability under acceleration. The extra grip makes the car much more stable, allowing for a more aggressive driving style. Since softer compounds increase PP, I added some ballast to compensate—preserving both acceleration and top speed.The car performs well on the Nordschleife, but it's also an excellent choice for any technical track. Sorry to the purists, but I won’t be doing a no-wing setup, at least not at this performance level. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
