Lancia Stratos '73 - MR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - Nordschleife - 1.58
Apr 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car Rims "16 - Rim Width Wide - Offset wide Front B - Wing Custom I’ve always loved this car since my teenage years, back when it dominated the rally scene. Above all, it’s a true work of art—one of the most beautiful cars on Earth, in my opinion. As for performance, I built a lightweight version with grippy soft tires. Top speed is decent, and while acceleration is just okay with only 270 HP, the real strength lies in carrying speed through corners—thanks to its exceptional grip. Don’t be afraid to drive it aggressively. The balance is neutral, and the car remains incredibly steady under pressure. You can expect lap times around 7:07 on the Nordschleife (in my hands)—and it delivers a fantastic driving experience. It truly drives like a proper MR car, reminding me of the legendary Lotus Elise from earlier Gran Turismo games. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

Audi R8 Coupé V10 plus '16 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.58
Apr 8, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Swap engine : 8.0-WR16-64v4T-Chiron (Bugatti Chiron) Wide Body Rims 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Side B - Rear B - Wing B This wild machine is my fastest road car on most tracks.It laps 1:25 on Daytona Road and 2:02 on Spa, which is incredibly quick for an 800PP road or race car. I spent a lot of time fine-tuning this overpowered beast. Initially, it was extremely unstable and tough to control with most of the setups I tried. But today, I finally cracked it. I added a bit of front ballast and tightened the rotation by increasing both the front and rear differential settings—initial and deceleration. Combined with a stiffer suspension, the car became manageable and ready for "attack mode." The handling still isn’t perfect, but the performance and driveability are now impressive.In my opinion, it fully deserves a 5-star rating.A stunning machine. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Porsche 911 Turbo S (992) '20 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 7, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP *****-Size "20 & "21-Front B - Wing BTop 800PP Road Car – Fast, Balanced, and Easy to Drive This car is one of the fastest 800PP road cars, combining excellent balance, 4WD stability, and impressive traction and grip. Its top-end speed is also outstanding, making it a strong contender on any track. It laps Daytona Road in 1:31. The only real weakness is a slight sluggishness through slow-speed apexes. Fortunately, the gearbox allows you to downshift to 1st gear to regain front-end bite when needed. A touch of front ballast is essential to keep the rear stable—without it, the car becomes very unstable under heavy braking at high speed, turning into a real handful. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Aston Martin Vulcan '16 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.58
Apr 7, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims Size "19 With superior grip and an excellent steady driving line, this car performs on par with race cars in terms of handling. However, its top speed is only good due to the high downforce, which limits its performance on straight sections. One major drawback is the high fuel consumption, preventing it from being viable for long endurance races like the Sardegna event. While it’s an excellent car overall, it falls short of earning 5 stars because of the fuel inefficiency and lower top speed. The rest, though, is truly exceptional. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

5 STARS950PPBathurstSuper Formula
Peugeot RCZ GrB Rally Car - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Le Mans - 1.58
Apr 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Performant 700PP Tarmac Setup. Very similar to the other Subaru Impreza GrB Rally car. This is not a dirt setup—I don’t know how to drive on dirt or tune cars for it. This is a performant 700PP tarmac setup, optimized for power and speed. Maintaining grip is crucial for maximum performance, so avoid late braking—once the grip from all four tires is gone, recovery takes time. Overdriving this car might be fun, but it’s not the fastest way around the track. Driven smoothly and precisely, it’s one of the fastest 700PP cars, lapping 2:15 on Spa. For Le Mans, I’ve set it up with an endurance-focused gearbox, allowing three laps per stint with short shifting. Expect consistent 3:49 lap times in race conditions. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

It can carry maximum power and run on Racing Soft tires, achieving an impressive 2:12 lap time on SPA and delivering superior performance on any track. 4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap: 2JZ-GTE-Supra (Toyota Supra '97) -Wide body-Size "19 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front B - Side B - Rear St (NO DIFFUSER)- Wing Custom A strong performer at 700PP, though I’m not sure what the point of this engine swap is. It’s a great engine, but fuel consumption is high. Be mindful of the high RPM kick—it can cause wheel spin, especially during transitions. The car has excellent balance, grip, and top speed, with a great engine sound in cockpit view. It matches the pace of the top road cars at this level, but it falls short of a 5-star rating due to rear-end instability caused by wheel spin at high RPM. I tried various adjustments but couldn’t fully eliminate this issue. It’s not a major problem if you’re aware of it, but pushing too hard in the wrong moment could lead to surprises. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

800PPBMWFRGr3WTC800
BMW M6 GT3 Endurance Model '16 - Gr3 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.57
Mar 29, 2025
Gr3 cars under the new 1.57 update have been completely nerfed. They still have the same balance, physics, and handling, but they’ve lost around 40 to 60 HP. Why did they do this? No idea. Gr3 cars under BOP weren’t overpowered to begin with, and now they feel more like Gr4 cars. Just another baffling move from Polyphony Digital—definitely not the first, and it won’t be the last. __________________________________________________________________________ I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

800PPMRMaserati
Suzuki Jimny Sierra JC '18 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - Tokyo - SWAP - 1.57
Mar 29, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : K24A-Civic (Garage RCR Civic) Wide BodySize "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side B - Rear B Dominant Sub-600PP Car with PP Bug This car has a PP bug that allows you to run maximum power and grippy tires for less than 600PP. It’s extremely fast and dominant on most tracks, with consistent 2:01 laps on Tokyo. There , you'll need 2 stop for gas and tires. It’s versatile enough to perform well anywhere. The only issue is the unstable rear end, especially when overdriving into fast turns. To manage this, you can use front ballast, which helps tame the instability. Here are three setup options: 0kg ballast: For professional, skilled drivers. Extremely fast but harder to control.50kg ballast at the front: A great balance—still very fast, relatively safe, but can surprise you if overdriven. Personally, I use the 50kg setup, as it offers the best balance of performance and stability. Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Standard Wheels. Very Fast and Versatile for Nordschleife This car excels on the Nordschleife and performs impressively on any track—just adjust the Final Gear for tracks with slower top speeds if needed. The current gearbox setup is optimized specifically for the Nordschleife's unique demands. It’s a safe and stable car overall, but be mindful when braking hard at high speeds if the car’s weight shifts laterally—this is typical behavior for a car without significant downforce. Important Tip: Pay close attention to the power curve—the engine’s power drops off quickly after 5300 RPM. For optimal performance, aim to shift gears between 5500 - 5700 RPM to stay in the sweet spot. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Lamborghini Aventador LP 700-4 '11 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 26, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP *****Wide CarRims 19" & 20"- Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Side B - Rear B - Wing Custom I’ve decided to raise this car by 1 star. Its performance is stupendous on Daytona Road, making it my fastest 800PP road car so far — by a large margin. This car is not only extremely fast but also easy to drive, matching the pace of the Nissan R34 SWAP, placing it among the very best 800PP road cars. It performs flawlessly on any track — whether it’s Daytona Road, Spa, or the Nordschleife. The only thing to keep in mind is its driving style. It’s not a bad behavior, just a characteristic to understand: ➡️ When entering a corner at high speed, avoid using too much steering angle and don’t hit the brakes too aggressively, like you might with other GT cars. Doing so could induce a drift or cause you to lose the rear end. Just be gentle with this beast in those moments, and it’ll reward you with outstanding performance. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS800PPDaytonaLamborghiniMR
Porsche 918 Spyder '13 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims 20" & 21" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Rear Standard - Wing Custom Just a good 800PP car — nothing extraordinary, but solid in every aspect. It offers good top speed, good grip, and good handling — reliable but not exceptional. That said, I love driving this car on any track. Its versatile setup makes it a great all-around performer. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4 stars800PPMRPorsche
Hyundai N 2025 VGT (Gr1) - 4WD -900PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 26, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** A totally dominant 900PP Gr.1 race car. This beast is lapping 1:52 at Spa and 1:25 at Daytona — seriously impressive times. It’s very easy to drive, with huge traction, excellent grip, and superior top speed. The car feels so predictable and precise that you can almost drive it with your eyes — every input responds exactly as expected. A true masterpiece on the track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS900PPGr1Hyundai
Porsche 962 C '88 - MR - 900PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 25, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Superior 900PP on SPA or any similar track , very good grip and top speed. Faster than the Audi RS 5 Turbo DTM '19 5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** I’ve added 1 star to this car. After refining the setup, it’s now my fastest 900PP race car at Spa, consistently lapping 1:53. This setup offers the best compromise between front grip and top speed that I’ve found after spending several hours testing it against some of my best ghosts. The car has a very steady line, superior grip, and a fantastic cockpit view paired with an amazing engine sound. It absolutely deserves 5 stars—without a doubt. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°
900PPGr1MRPorsche
Peugeot L750R Hybrid VGT '17 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 25, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This car offers similar overall performance to the Bugatti VGT Gr.1, with slightly more speed but slightly less grip. Although it’s technically a 4WD, it doesn’t quite behave like one. When accelerating out of slow corners, you’ll need to watch for rear wheel spin, much like you would with an FR or MR car. Its pace is solid, matching other top 800PP race cars — lapping 2:05 at Spa and 1:33 at Sardegna. A strong performer with a unique driving feel. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD800PPGr1Peugeot
Bugatti VGT Gr1 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 25, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** The Bugatti Gr.1 is back in form! After being nerfed in previous updates, it now benefits from a PP gain, putting it back among the top Gr.1 performance cars. It’s lapping 2:05 at Spa and consistently hitting 1:33 at Sardegna.Features superior front grip and excellent acceleration out of slow corners — the 4WD system works flawlessly, making the car very safe and allowing you to push hard without major issues. While a few Gr.1 legends like the Mazda 787B and Nissan R92CP are still slightly faster, especially at Sardegna, this Bugatti is now a top contender once again. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS800PPBugattiGr1

Toyota Sprinter Trueno 1600GT APEX (AE86) '83 - FR - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 23, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide car Rims size 14" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Rear A - Wing B A top-tier 500PP road car, this machine is truly impressive. I prioritize stability and control here, which is why I’m using the Rear Part A diffuser. While it slightly increases PP, I compensate by skipping racing brakes and pads. The brakes are still good, just remember to brake a bit earlier than usual. The engine is peaky, so you’ll need to shift at very high RPM, close to the electronic limiter. Don’t be afraid of fast bends—this is where the car truly shines. Its grip and stability in high-speed corners are impressive. You'll need to adjust the gearbox for each track — whether it's slow or fast — due to the engine’s power delivery. This current gearbox setup is tuned for Nordschleife. To adapt it for other tracks, just adjust the final gear — that way, you'll maintain the same gear ratios while adjusting for slower or faster circuits. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS500PPFRNordschleifeToyota
Honda RA272 '65 - MR - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - Le Mans - 1.56
Mar 23, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** I’m using the same 600PP Tokyo setup on this car, and the soft springs work great for absorbing bumps and preventing any weird movements. The car feels stable, sane, and easy to drive, consistently lapping 3:57 with ease. Thanks to the RA272 engine, its fuel consumption is incredibly low — it’s a mystery to me, but that’s just how it is! And of course, the fantastic cockpit view makes the experience even better, whether on TV or in VR2 — truly immersive and enjoyable. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPHondaLe MansMR
Honda RA272 '65 - MR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Tokyo - 1.56
Mar 23, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** An excellent car, but it requires a special driving style—one that emphasizes flow and avoids disrupting the car's inertia. Using the trail braking technique is key: apply light brake pressure when entering corners to maintain stability and control. The car’s power peaks at high RPM, so timing your shifts is crucial. It consistently laps 2:09 for a no-stop race, with a total race time of around 26 minutes. The cockpit view is fantastic—you must try it! And for VR2, it’s simply amazing—the immersion and sensation are on another level. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
600PPHondaMRTokyo
Ford Escort RS Cosworth '92 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine swap : L4-Focus-Gr.B (Ford Focus Gr.B)Wide carRims "16 - Offset WideFront A - Side A - Rear B - Wing A I’ve chosen the grip-focused setup for this car. While top speed and acceleration are only good, its grip and drivability are excellent. You can flow through the bends at high speed, confidently choosing your fastest line to overtake opponents — it’s a truly pleasurable experience, lap after lap. Although its lap times aren’t quite on par with the very top Tokyo cars (around 2:08 / 2:09), it makes up for it with a non-stop 12-lap race capability, thanks to its Gr.B swap engine. A fantastic choice for a smooth yet competitive drive! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** SWAP ENGINE: LS7-Rampage (Roadster Shop Rampage) Wide car Rims size "17 & "18 Front A - Side A - Wing custom Like most SWAP engine setups, this one has a few PP bugs. Finding the sweet spot requires careful adjustment of ballast, power, and downforce. After several tests, I found a setup that feels just right—balanced, fast, and easy to drive. These are always my main goals when tuning: achieving performance without sacrificing driving pleasure and control. I’m not a fan of radical setups—they’re often more frustrating than fun. But this one? I love it. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

Subaru WRX Gr4 - 4WD - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** This is a very fast, grippy car with great top speed and superior grip. The light rear end allows you to easily place the car, even drifting at times if needed. It's very reactive to inputs, making it a joy to drive aggressively. While most Gr.4 cars are within half a second per lap of each other, the 4WD options tend to be easier to push hard and offer more confidence on the limit. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°______________________________________________________________________ I'm going to put a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track.

Amuse Nismo 380RS Super Leggera - FR - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Rims 20"Wing Custom This car has a fixed rear diffuser, which gives it superior grip but also limits power and top speed relative to the PP level. For 700PP, I recommend the SWAP option—it’s an amazing car at that level. At 600PP, it’s too slow for Tokyo, but it’s perfect for technical tracks like Nordschleife. The steering is very precise, and the balance feels just perfect. Its performance is good, perhaps even superior on slower technical tracks, but on Nordschleife, it could use a bit more top speed to match the very best 600PP road cars. Even so, it laps around 6:10, which is just 5 seconds slower than my top three cars there: ✅ Subaru WRX Gr.B Road Car✅ Ford Escort RS '92✅ Audi TTS Coupé '09 A solid choice with fantastic handling and grip! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota S-FR '15 - FR - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Mar 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims size "17 - Width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Custom An excellent car with a perfect driving feel—it's truly a joy to drive. The car is very precise and reactive, offering a fantastic sense of control. I especially love driving it on Nordschleife or Brands Hatch—the feedback and agility are exceptional. However, it doesn’t earn a 5-star rating for one reason: it’s not as performant. It runs at the level of medium to good 500PP cars. On technical tracks, a skilled driver can keep up with the best by fully exploiting its agility, but on the straights, faster cars will pull away. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
500PPFRNordschleifeToyota
Toyota GT-One (TS020) '99 - Gr2 - MR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This car can be the fastest Gr.2 car on fast tracks. At Spa, it’s about 0.5 seconds slower than most other Gr.2 race cars. The original setup is nearly undrivable due to excessive wheel spin, making it very hard to control. To fix this issue, I added a heavy rear ballast, which not only stabilizes the car but also allows for: More power without upsetting the balanceLess front downforce while maintaining stability It's ok for Sardegna, but you’ll need to save fuel for a one-stop strategy. On Nordschleife, it’s also very fast, but be sure to stay off the kerbs or consider using softer springs for better control. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Engine SWAP : LT5-Corvette-C7 (Chevrolet Corvette C7 ZR1) Wide CarRims 19"Rims With Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side A - Rear Standard - Wing Custom I’ve tested several ballast options, starting with: Rear diffuser + Racing Hard tiresRear part standard + Racing Medium tires The second option proved to be the best by far, offering an excellent combination of speed, grip, and overall balance. This car is an excellent choice that performs well on any track—whether it’s the Nordschleife, Daytona, or even technical circuits. However, it’s not ideal for Le Mans due to its high fuel consumption. It can only manage 2 laps using Fuel Mode 6 with short shifting. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Mar 18, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** With its original weight at 800PP, this car doesn’t have enough power to compete with the top Gr.2 cars. By adding around 200 kg, you can unlock more horsepower, making the car very competitive—on par with the Lexus SC430 '08, which is an excellent reference. For Sardegna, you can manage a one-stop strategy: Fuel Mode 2 for the first stint (7 laps)Fuel Mode 3 for the second stint (8 laps) Expect consistent lap times around 1:34 to 1:35, with a total race time of approximately 24 minutes and 30 seconds. A solid performer! Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

De Tomaso Pantera '71 - MR - 460PP - Comfort Soft Tires - Alsace Mission - 1.56
Mar 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** NO WIDE BODYRims "16 - Offset Wide - Rims wideFront Standard - Wing Standard This isn’t a special setup—I’m using stock suspension, gearbox, normal differential, and normal transmission. The only adjustments are Weight Reduction Stage 3 and some ballast. There’s no need to buy all the weight reduction stages—just aim to match the target weight. The car feels perfect like this, consistently lapping 2:21 – 2:22 with a two-stop strategy for fuel only. It’s an incredibly pleasant drive, offering a great driving sensation and strong performance. I spent one full hour driving without feeling bored for a second. The car’s perfect balance and reactive handling make it a joy to race. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

De Tomaso Pantera '71 - MR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: Coyote-5.0L-Mustang (Ford Mustang GT '15) Wide Body Rims 16" - rims width wide - Offset wide - Wing Custom This car is amazing. Don't wait a 100% steady driving line , nothing anormal for an old '71 super car, with a 5.0L engine and a low downforce. In spite of this, the car is very performant, very pleasant to drive anywhere, sure it prefer large tracks like Trial mountain or Le Mans, or any technical track. You can even drive it on Nordschleife with decent lap time close to +6:30 , but you'll have to practice there to be fast without overdrive the car. If you drive it too hard there, you'll be punished before the end of the lap. It was a very hard car to set. I spent around 6 hours on it. For me it's a very long time to do a car. I'm very happy with the result. I'll drive it regularly for sure. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** -Wide body-Size "19 & "20 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front B - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom I couldn’t find any real faults with this car. 5 STARS800PPChevroletFRNordschleife
Ferrari 250 GTO '62 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Mar 16, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Body Rims "19 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Rear Wing : Custom This car is very fast on the Nordschleife or any other track, and it’s easy to drive. It’s perfectly matched in pace against the Shelby Cobra Daytona Coupé '64, making it a great competitor. To improve handling, I’ve added some few rear ballast to reduce wheel spin and enhance front-end grip and precision. This adjustment has made a noticeable difference in stability, especially in tighter corners. One crucial thing to note: don’t lower the ride height too much. Doing so can cause issues with the tires or rims rubbing against the front fenders, which can make the car undrivable. Keeping the ride height in check ensures smooth performance and prevents handling problems. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

It didn’t quite earn 5 stars (though it’s very close) because the chassis feels a bit short to fully handle the power with its current downforce setup and no rear diffuser for added stability. Just remember to stay within the tire’s grip limit—if you push beyond it, you won’t lose control, but you’ll sacrifice a bit of time. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°°

700PPGr4Honda
Honda NSX Gr4 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****One of the top 5 Gr4 BOP Cars This is one of the fastest Gr4 BOP cars, with superior grip, agility, and precise handling. It’s perfect for fast tracks, though 4WD cars are slightly faster on slower tracks with tight corners due to their superior traction out of slow corners. You can find  "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr4 or Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

800PPFerrariMR
Nissan R34 GT-R V-spec II Nur '02 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 11, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** engine swap : VRH35Z-R92CP Wide body Rims 17" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Rear A - Wing A This car is an excellent and safe choice, as you’d expect from most 4WD vehicles. The gearbox is tuned for Nordschleife (laps 6:30) and Spa (laps 2:16), but you can easily adapt it for other tracks by shortening the gears with the final gear.Fuel consumption is very low thanks to the racing engine, but there’s already a faster Le Mans setup available with less front grip and more power/top speed. It’s a reactive car, giving you the confidence to translate your inputs directly into precise and controlled driving. Enjoy your drive . ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

It’s consistently lapping 2:16 low at Spa, which is better than most top road cars in this class. It’s also perfect for Daytona Road or any other fast track. Mar 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims 15" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Rear A - Wing Standard A performant and beautiful car, truly one of the standout models from the '60s era. It’s perfect for any track, and I especially enjoy racing it on Brands Hatch or even the Nordschleife, where it can hold its own against the best 500PP cars in the game. An absolute gem to drive using cockpit view ! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: 2JZ-GTE-Supra (Toyota Supra '97) Wide Body Rims '16 - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side A - Rear B - Wing Custom I don’t recommend this engine swap for this car. While the setup and handling remain the same, the 2JZ-GTE Supra swap at the same PP level has some downsides: Heavier and 70 HP less than the stock engine.Higher fuel consumption, making it unsuitable for the Le Mans 700PP event.I also prefer the original engine sound. That said, the handling is excellent—very precise and grippy, making it a great choice for Nordschleife or any technical track. Performance is strong, but it’s just below the absolute top cars in this class. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Engine SWAP : K24A-Civic (Garage RCR Civic)Wide carRims 15" - Width wide - Offset wideFront A - Rear A - Wing A A very fast car on Nordschleife, with good balance, grip, and excellent top speed. The gearbox is tuned for Nordschleife, but you can adjust the final gear to shorten it for slower tracks if needed. Versatile and high-performing! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Lamborghini Aventador LP750-4 SV '15 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 5, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide car Rims 20" & 21" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Wing custom This is my fastest 800PP road car, alongside the Pagani Zonda R, and even slightly faster than the Nissan R34. Laps Spa in 2:05 and goes sub-6 minutes on Nordschleife.Superior grip, agility, and top speed—it has almost everything.While the handling is good, its overall performance makes it a clear 5-star car in the 800PP class. An absolute beast on the track! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series '20 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Mar 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims " 19 & "20 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Wing Custom Almost earned a 5-star label, but the handling isn’t perfect. Performance is excellent—6:02 on Nordschleife and 2:06 at Spa.You can buy another one to drive it stock, as its original setup is already fantastic.At 600PP with Sport Hard tires, it’s very easy to drive and competitive in the Tokyo event. I love the car this way! Personally, I have three Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series in my garage. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°

Audi TTS Coupé '09 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Mar 5, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Car Rims "20 - Offset Wide - Rims wide Front A - Side B - Rear A - Wing B A top-tier 600PP car on Nordschleife, lapping 7:04 in my hands. Superior grip and top speedPrecise, easy handling—you can push hard without punishment The same setup works well on Tokyo with Sport Hard tires, but you’ll need a longer gearbox. It’s still a winning car, but top speed is just decent, so it’s not the absolute best there. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS600PPAUDINordschleife
Shelby Cobra 427 '66 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 5, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Rear B - Wing Standard Here’s the "NO WING" setup option. It’s a wonderful car, very stable and enjoyable to drive at this level. Performance is solid, and grip is excellent.The no-wing option increases the car’s PP, meaning you can’t add as much extra power as with the winged setup.It’s not very fair, but that’s just how PP works in this game—rear downforce lowers PP, while front downforce raises it. Honestly, it’s a strange system. In my opinion, front and rear downforce should be combined to calculate a fair PP value. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Mercedes-Benz CLK-LM '98 - FR - 800PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 4, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** The new 1.56 update setup now includes rear ballast, giving it more grip, a more precise front end, and no wheel spin. Perfect for Nordschleife with a slightly longer gearbox.Great for Sardegna, and very versatile overall—also excellent at Spa or any technical track.VEry good grip, strong top speed, and easy handling. It’s on the same pace as the Lexus SC430 GT500 '08, but with a bit more top speed and slightly less grip. Definitely a top-tier Gr.2 car! Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°

Plymouth Superbird '70 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : Hellcat-Charger (Dodge Charger SRT Hellcat) Wide BodySize "16 - Offset wideFront Standard. Again, I have to say—no downforce on this type of car makes it tricky to drive, but I’ve found a nice balance, and it’s manageable on fast tracks. It’s strong car at Le Mans, but you’ll need to run Fuel Mode 5 for better efficiency. Of course, don’t overdrive it—the only thing keeping it on the road is tire grip. If you push past that limit, goodbye! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
700PPFRPlymouthSWAP
Shelby Cobra 427 '66 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 4, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 17" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Rear B - Wing Custom Remember, I’m using a manual gearbox on this car. My goal was to keep it drivable at this level, so I opted for medium tires to compensate for the weak downforce, providing the extra grip needed on technical tracks. It performs very well anywhere—from Nordschleife to Laguna Seca and even Le Mans, where you’ll need to run Fuel Mode 6 for three laps before pitting. Performance is solid, with consistent 4:03 lap times. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
700PPFRShelby
Bugatti Chiron '16 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 4, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Rim size "20 & "21 Rim Width WideFront A - Side St - Wing Custom My fastest 800PP road supercar, consistently lapping in the high 1:30s on Daytona road. It’s also great for Nordschleife and Spa, keeping pace with the top cars in this class. Very stable and easy to drive, but I had to add a bit of front ballast to keep the rear end controlled under braking and when lifting off the throttle. Without it, I would have needed extreme settings that would overly tighten the car. I also adjusted the torque distribution from 25/75 to 30/60 for better balance. If you prefer a more aggressive exit in slow to medium-speed turns, you can switch it back to 25/75. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS800PPBugatti
Ford GT '06 - MR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 3, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Wide Body Rims "20 "21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Custom People often ask me about a 6-star label, and my answer is always the same—all 5-star cars could be 6-star cars for some, but not for others. It depends on personal preference. For me, with my driving style and preference for feedback and sensation, this car absolutely deserves 6 STARS ******! I love how it moves and reacts to steering inputs. An excellent car for Nordschleife or any other track, consistently lapping around 6:30 in my hands. It has a steady and precise driving line, with no bad surprises, even when pushing it hard. One of the very few truly perfect 700PP cars in the game—great top speed, excellent grip, and outstanding stability. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS700PPFordMR
Nissan Fairlady Z 300ZX TT 2S '89 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : VR38DETT-GT-R-Nismo (Nissan GT-R NISMO '17) Wide Body Rims "18 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Rear B - Wing custom A good car, but after the 1.56 update, it lost one star. It’s still on the edge of a 5-star rating, but a few things—especially the handling—aren’t as precise as in the 1.50 setup. The older setup didn’t work anymore—it still had grip, but it was too slow. I had to rebuild the car completely, using a heavy rear ballast. This was the only way I found to get a lighter, more precise front end while maintaining good power and top speed for the same 700PP. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

BMW Z4 3.0i '03 - FR - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 3, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front St - Side St - Rear A - Wing A This setup works for 550PP on Sport Hard tires or 600PP on Sport Medium tires, but it’s more performant at 550PP. A top 10 at 550PP car on Nordschleife, offering precise handling and a neutral balance—it does exactly what you want on track. Top speed: ExcellentGrip: Very strongHandling: Superior A must-drive for anyone looking for a fast and well-balanced car! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
550PPBMWFRNordschleife
Plymouth Superbird '70 - FR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide BodySize "16 - Offset wideFront Standard. A strong 600PP car, consistently lapping around 7:35 on Nordschleife. It features the typical large rear wing, but surprisingly, it doesn’t generate any real downforce. Be sure to check the power curve—shifting around 6,500 RPM gives the best performance. A very enjoyable drive on any track! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPFRNordschleifePlymouth
Subaru Impreza 22B STI '98 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo rain - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap : EJ20-Impreza-Rally (Subaru Impreza Rally Car '99) -Wide body-Size "17 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide-Front St - Side St - Wing Custom Note: some PP values have changed for a few swap cars since recent updates.The only way to correct it is by: Using normal brakesSetting the front downforce to 24 Brakes aren’t so critical on Tokyo—just make sure to adjust to the new braking points. This car is one of the fastest in the Tokyo Rain event, consistently lapping 1:59 with a best of 1:58 low. One pit stop for fuel only. Be mindful of the understeer—there’s no real way to improve it due to a PP bug, similar to the Impreza '99. To counter this, downshift at higher RPMs to gain extra grip and hit the apex more effectively. The gearbox is very long, designed around the mid-range power band. To stay competitive, you need to keep the RPMs in this range for maximum performance. 4 stars only because of a slight understeer issue that I couldn’t fully eliminate with the available tuning options. Otherwise, it’s an excellent car with strong performance! ⚙️ Gearbox Setup: The gearing is extremely long due to the power curve.Peak power is at 5,500 RPM, so shift between 6,500 – 6,700 RPM for best performance.DO NOT rev to the limiter—you’ll lose a lot of speed.Automatic transmission won’t work well; using it will result in significantly lower performance. A true beast, but it demands proper shifting to unleash its full potential! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD600PPSWAPSubaru
Ford Sierra RS 500 Cosworth '87 - FR - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - Le Mans - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 2, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine swap : L4-Focus-Gr.B (Ford Focus Gr.B) Wide car Rims "17 - Offset Wide - Rims wide -Front B - Side A - Rear A - Wing B It’s not a great car, and setting it up properly was challenging. Performance is just okay, but the one place where it truly shines is Le Mans—so here’s a setup specifically for that event. It still drives reasonably well on other tracks, but it’s nothing exceptional. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

4WD5 STARS700PPFordNordschleife
Lamborghini Veneno '14 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Mar 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims "20 & "21 Very strong pace, with excellent top speed and grip. I added 100 kg of front ballast to keep the rear end stable under heavy braking—this is the only way to properly balance the car. The result is a nicely balanced, neutral setup with great overall grip. I would have preferred adjustable downforce settings to fine-tune the balance, but unfortunately, the front spoiler and wing are fixed, leaving no customization options. That said, the handling remains proactive and highly responsive, making it a pleasure to drive! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD800PPLamborghini
Subaru Impreza Coupe WRX Type R '99 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: EJ20-Impreza-Rally Wide carRims size 18"Width wideOffset wideFront A - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom This car laps under 2 minutes in my hands, with tremendous top speed and good grip. There’s some understeer in the bends, but an important tip—downshift to high RPM to help rotate the car and hit the apex more effectively. Ideally, I’d lower rear downforce, tweak power output, or add some ballast to improve balance. However, due to the PP bug affecting most engine swaps in this game, making these changes would push it over the 600PP limit. Still, even with these constraints, it’s an absolute weapon on track! 4 stars only because of a slight understeer issue that I couldn’t fully eliminate with the available tuning options. Otherwise, it’s an excellent car with strong performance! ⚙️ Gearbox Setup: The gearing is extremely long due to the power curve.Peak power is at 5,500 RPM, so shift between 6,500 – 6,700 RPM for best performance.DO NOT rev to the limiter—you’ll lose a lot of speed.Automatic transmission won’t work well; using it will result in significantly lower performance. A true beast, but it demands proper shifting to unleash its full potential! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD600PPSWAPSubaruTokyo
Subaru Impreza Coupe WRX Type R '99 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Soft Tires - Nordschleife - SWAP - 1.56
Mar 1, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP: EJ20-Impreza-Rally Wide carRims size 18"Width wideOffset wideFront A - Side B - Rear A - Wing Custom My fastest monster swap 700PP car on Nordschleife, lapping a blistering 6:14 with tremendous speed and grip. This car doesn’t have a rear diffuser, which would help stabilize it—overdriving can upset the balance. The chassis feels a bit short for the insane power and grip at all four corners, but if you respect the limits, it’s still easy to drive. That’s why it gets 4 stars instead of 5. It performs well anywhere, from Spa to technical tracks, but one very important point: ⚙️ Gearbox Setup: The gearing is extremely long due to the power curve.Peak power is at 5,500 RPM, so shift between 6,500 – 6,700 RPM for best performance.DO NOT rev to the limiter—you’ll lose a lot of speed.Automatic transmission won’t work well; using it will result in significantly lower performance. A true beast, but it demands proper shifting to unleash its full potential! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD700PPNordschleifeSWAPSubaru
Audi Sport Quattro S1 '87- 4WD - 600 PP - Sport Hard Tires - Tokyo Rain event - 1.56
Feb 28, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Lapping consistently in 2:05 to 2:06, with perfect handling. To hit the apex precisely, use light brake inputs to control the front end—don’t overdrive it or rely on late braking.It have a superior grip but a limited top speed due to the sqaure shape of the body. Respect your braking markers, and the car will flow like a bullet on track! Enjoy your drive ><(((((°>°°°°°°

Audi Sport Quattro S1 '87 - 4WD - 600 PP - Sport Medium Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Feb 28, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** No parts or rims available to change performance on this car . Rims only cosmetics. Close to a 7:00 lap in my hands, with superior grip and top speed. This is easily one of the top 600PP cars on Nordschleife or any other track. It offers great precision at the wheel and responds immediately to all driving inputs, making it a highly reactive and rewarding car to drive. Enjoy your drive ><(((((°>°°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS600PPAUDINordschleife
Audi Sport Quattro S1 '87 - 4WD - 700 PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.56
Feb 28, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** No performance parts or rim options available for this car—rims are purely cosmetic. A top-tier 700PP car for any track, though it falls just short of 5 stars due to its handling. It consistently laps in the low 2:13s at Spa. Just be mindful of late braking—make sure to set the correct wheel angle on entry. If not, you might lose the rear, though it’s not a major issue—you’ll just drift instead. That said, staying in line is slightly more efficient. It also performs perfectly in this week's Trial Mountain event! Enjoy your drive ><(((((°>°°°°°°
4WD700PPAUDI
Pagani Huayra '13 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.56
Feb 28, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Ok ok ,Back to the 5 stars mentions 😂👍👌🙌"CustomX :Silly reason to give it 4 😅 I think better to treat each car on its merits. If it deserves 5 then it deserves 5*" Wide car. Rims 19" & 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side A - Wing Custom An excellent car overall. I’ve added some rear ballast to gain more power instead of weight, improving front-end precision and making it point to the apex more effectively. Despite its powerful setup, it’s still an easy car to handle, suitable for any track—from Daytona to Spa or Nordschleife. It’s heavy, but it makes up for it with superior top speed, strong grip, and solid acceleration. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°°
5 STARS800PPMRPagani
Honda NSX GrB Rally Car - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Feb 28, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Performant 700PP Tarmac Setup Lapping 2:16 on SPA, this setup is on par with the Peugeot RCZ GrB Rally Car. It’s an aggressive setup, so be cautious not to brake too late at high speeds while applying wheel angle. Precise inputs are essential here. Brake in a straight line, then release the brake pedal smoothly while controlling the wheel angle to manage the rear end. If you overdo it, you won’t lose the rear entirely, but you’ll induce a drift that slows the car down. This car is also highly performant in the Le Mans 30-minute race, achieving 3:52 lap times. You’ll need to short shift or use FM 2 to complete three laps. For Le Mans, you don’t need as much front grip, so lowering the front downforce to 130 is recommended. This adjustment makes the car more stable under braking at the end of the Mulsanne Straight or when entering the Porsche Curves. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD700PPGrBHondaLe Mans
Honda Integra Type R (DC2) '98 - FF - 550PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.56
Feb 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : K20C1-Civic-'20 (Honda Civic Type R '20) Wide Body Size "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront B - Side A - Rear A - Wing Custom Good Performance 550PP Car This is a solid 550PP car with a steady driving line and decent front grip for an FF layout. I also tried setting it at 600PP, but the wheel spin limit is best controlled at the 550PP level, with 300HP on the front wheels.Performant and fun to drive on Nordschleife. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
550PPFFHondaSWAP
Honda Integra Type R (DC2) '95 - FF - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - Nordschleife - 1.56
Feb 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** NO Wide Body this time. -Size "19 - Rims Width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing Custom This car is excellent— fast on the Nordschleife but still 4 second slower than Peugeot GTI, clocking in at under 8 minutes. It boasts a great driving line with almost no understeer, which is rare for FF cars. At this power level, it doesn't exhibit wheel spin, which is my top priority for enjoying these kinds of vehicles. Overall, it’s a pleasure to drive! Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
500PPFFHondaNordschleife
Peugeot 205 GTI '88 - FF - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.56
Feb 27, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP *****Wide carRims "15 - Rims width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side B - Rear A - Wing A This car is an absolute blast to drive! There’s a bit of wheel spin in 1st gear, but nothing unmanageable—you can even use traction control at 1 if you prefer. It perfectly captures the feel of classic FF French cars in real life. The handling is super reactive under braking, with a lively rear end and great rotation. If you want to see how an FF car can be pushed to the limit, check out Jean Ragnotti, one of the best rally drivers of the '80s and a true FF car specialist—yes, FF cars can drift! https://youtu.be/25VRiIeFJfA This setup is tuned for Nordschleife and other fast tracks, with the rear end slightly tightened for better high-speed stability, but it still feels very responsive. For shorter tracks like Tsukuba or Brands Hatch, you can lower the rear downforce to the minimum or even go wingless for a more playful feel. You'll notice even more feedback under braking, especially when combined with precise steering inputs—it's an amazingly rewarding sensation. Performance-wise, it's excellent, keeping up with the very best 500PP cars in the game. Just remember to shift at very high RPM, right before the limiter, to stay in the power band! Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°
5 STARS500PPBrands HatchFFNordschleifePeugeotTsukuba

Feb 27, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Wide carRims "19 & "20 - Rims width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side A - Wing Custom Well-Balanced but Medium Performance This car is very well-balanced and reactive, though slightly heavy. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Feb 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car Rims "19 - Rim Width Wide - Offset wide Front B - Side A - Wing B I set the car up at 550PP to avoid the wheel spin caused by higher power, which was disrupting the driving line and front grip—really annoying in my opinion. Also because the 600PP is not performant. At this power level, the car performs exceptionally well on Nordschleife. While the top speed is just good, the grip is superior, allowing me to lap in 7:35, a very competitive time for top 550PP cars. Have a good drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Bugatti Veyron 16.4 '13 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 26, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 20" & 21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Custom An excellent 700PP car, consistently hitting low 2:17s at Spa and close to 6:30 on Nordschleife. It’s very safe and grippy, making it perfect for beginners who want to learn any track at a fast yet controlled pace. The NO WING option isn’t an issue on this track, as the car maintains excellent flow, grip, and eagerness through corners. It could be slightly faster with added power and a wing, but it already surpasses 300 km/h, so I’ve kept the full weight, with no weight reduction. Feb 25, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** The car lost a bit more front downforce while staying at 950PP after update 1.55. As a result, I couldn’t quite match my previous ghost at Spa, trailing by about half a second, but still managing consistent 1:50 laps. To improve stability, I had to lower the rear springs to the minimum, as the car was prone to losing the rear under aggressive inputs, especially in Pouhon’s fast double-left. I’ll also check if the Hyundai VGT Gr.1 is still my fastest Gr.1 car at Spa. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Honda Beat '91 - MR - 550PP - Sport Soft Tires - Tokyo rain - SWAP - 1.55
Feb 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** ENGINE SWAP: K20C1-Civic-'20 -Wide body - Size "15 & "16- Rims width wide - Offset wide -Front A - Side A - Wing Custom Another “Frankenstein” swap built for Tokyo. But don’t be fooled—you can take this beast anywhere. It reaches 370 km/h (230 mph) at the end of the straight, making it a serious contender. However, it’s not the easiest car to drive fast, as it relies on extreme settings to maximize performance. Braking Points: End of the straight: Just under the Tokyo Express gate, before the large yellow HARMAN billboard on the left.Before the final double left-hander: Around four car lengths before the 200m marker. This car consistently laps 1:57–1:58, depending on traffic, with a personal best of 1:56.9xx in my hands. Plan to pit after six laps for fuel and tires. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Rims 19" &20" - rims width wide - Offset wide A perfect car—lapping under 6 minutes on the Nordschleife and hitting 2:05 at Spa. Bugatti Veyro 16.4 '13 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - NO WING - All Track - 1.55
Feb 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 20" & 21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Standard This "no-wing" option was a specific request, and while the car still drives very well, it’s not truly a wingless setup. The retractable wing deploys automatically—though I’m not sure whether it’s triggered by speed, G-forces, or both. The main issue is that this wing, whether up or down, can sometimes interfere with the driving line, making the car feel inconsistent. Personally, I’d prefer either a true no-wing setup or a fully adjustable custom wing, like the one I used in my other build. That said, the car remains fun to drive and highly competitive, offering strong performance across various tracks. Enjoy your drive ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD800PPBugattiDaytona
Bugatti Veyro 16.4 '13 - 4WD - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Daytona road - 1.55
Feb 24, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Car. Rims 20" & 21 - rims width wide - Offset wide Front A - Side St - Wing Custom My fastest 800 PP road-going supercar on the Daytona Road Course. While it performs well on other tracks, its standout feature is its significantly higher top speed compared to the competition. Grip is solid, but the car is heavier than most. To improve front-end precision and grip, I use rear ballast and a rake setup. Without these adjustments, understeer becomes a major limitation, especially in slow and medium-speed corners. I also run a 35/65 torque distribution to enhance corner exit traction under acceleration. Enjoy your drive ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Nismo 400R '95 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims "19 - Rim width Wide - Offset Wide Front A - Side B - Rear St - Wing B Excellent car, lapping 6:30 on Nordschleife in my hands. It’s very stable and grippy, with good top speed. There’s a bit of understeer, but it’s easily manageable. A great choice for the Le Mans event, capable of 3 laps in Fuel Mode 4, with lap times under 4 minutes. One important note: pay attention to the engine's mid-power range. The maximum power peaks at 6700 RPM, so shifting around 7500 RPM is crucial. Setting your car to reach this max horsepower at the optimal moment on the track can make a significant difference. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Porsche 911 RSR "991) '17 - Gr3 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** I've setted a very low ride height and low downforce to match the speed the others very top Gr3 like Lexus RC F GT3 '17. It's an excelent car , one of my favorite Gr3 car. I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°°

5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** -Wide body - Rims Size "24- Rims width wide -Front A - Side A - Rear A - Wing B This car is perfect—despite being heavy, it has the agility of a lighter rally car. It offers excellent grip, top speed, and acceleration, while being easy to drive. It’s also very forgiving, allowing you to recover from mistakes, including late braking situations. This makes it a great choice for any player, from beginners to top-level drivers. It laps under 6:30 on Nordschleife, placing it among the very best 700PP cars. That’s why it earns a well-deserved 5-star rating. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((((°>°°°°°°

Audi R8 Coupé V10 plus '16 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 22, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims 20" - rims width wide - Offset wide Front B - Side B - Rear B - Wing B Faster than a Porsche 911 '16 on SPA and currently my fastest 800PP road car on Daytona Road, with a lap time of 1:32. The handling is good, but I’d prefer a slightly steadier line, especially considering the full downforce setup and rear diffuser B part, which should theoretically make it feel more like a race car. It’s still very good, but other road cars in this game feel more planted—why not this one? A true GT mystery. That said, it’s an easy car to drive, making it perfect for online lobby racing. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°

Lancia Delta HF Int EVO '91 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Medium tires - Nordschleife - 1.55
Feb 22, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** -Wide body- Size "15 / Rims width wide / Offset wide-Front B - Side A - Rear A - Wing A This is my fastest 1.55 road car with the original engine on Nordschleife so far with a 7:06 lap in my hands. Keep in mind that the power curve peaks at mid-RPM, so shift at 7,500 RPM for the best performance. The top speed in the last gear is set at 320 km/h, but that’s because you need to be at 7,200 RPM at the end of the straight, where max power is delivered. A shorter gearbox would cost you 10 km/h in top speed. The car has great grip, good top speed, and strong acceleration. Since it’s a 4WD with a heavy front end, it offers excellent stability, allowing you to be more aggressive with your inputs to keep it on the ideal racing line. Driving heavy front-end cars requires a specific approach, but once mastered, it’s rewarding.Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD5 STARS600PPLanciaNordschleife
Suzuki V6 Escudo Pikes Peak SP '98 - 4WD - 600PP - Comfort medium tires - Tokyo event only - 1.55
Feb 21, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Rims up "17 - Width Wide - Offset Wide This car lap at 2:04 regular / 2:03 high in my hands. 1 stop for gas only. This car has very poor grip at low speeds, but as speed increases, so does grip—offering huge stability in medium and fast corners. The engine is extremely peaky, so you’ll need to stay in the highest RPM range possible. It’s a technical car to drive, requiring precise timing when aiming for the apex. Under braking, the car is highly reactive, and steering input must be precise. The rear end can slide slightly, but it won’t take too much angle—just enough to help you better position the car through medium-speed corners. Out of slow corners, the 900HP kicks in at 8,000 RPM, which can induce a light drift. Try to use this to your advantage to maximize traction on corner exits. This setup is optimized specifically for the Tokyo event. It don't work well at all on slow to medium speed track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
4WD600PPSuzukiTokyo
Suzuki V6 Escudo Pikes Peak SP '98 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 21, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** Rims up "17 or "20 - Width Wide - Offset Wide This 700PP car now laps as fast as Gr3 800PP cars on Daytona or SPA and is much easier to drive.I believe it’s my fastest 700PP car by far. Plus, it’s a very fun ride—reactive and highly performant." Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°° IMPORTANT POINT: The power curve on this car stay in a very and narrow high RPM range only. This gearbox is perfect for SPA and a few others tracks of this kind. If you need to build a specific gearbox at another place, do like this. 1- Check if the 1st gear fit well out of the slower corner of the circuit. Good power range for powerfull out corner. 2- Check the max speed you'll get in the longer straight of this circuit. You need to reach this speed when your engine stay in the max power RPM range. Check the graph and numbers. For this car power max at 8000RPM. 3-Spread the intermediary gears heavenly, tayloring those gears for others slow or medium speed turns of this circuit. Done. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°

Ford Escort RS Cosworth '92 - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Nordschleife - 1.55
Feb 20, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP *****Wide carRims "16 - Offset Wide Front A - Side A - Rear St - Wing A Superior 600PP on Nordschleife. I purchased three versions of this car—one to keep stock because I love driving it as-is, and another to explore additional options later. This is a superior 600PP car on Nordschleife, outperforming most normal engine cars (though some Frankenstein SWAPs may be faster). I don’t use racing brakes or pads; the stock brakes are sufficient, allowing me to allocate more power within the 600PP limit. Its overall performance earns it a 5-star rating, even though the handling is only "good"—it deserves the ***** label. I’ve also tested a Tokyo setup, and while it’s decent for now but only lap 2:10 , good time but not enough to publish it. There is a lot others that can do a better job for Tokyo. Enjoy your drive . ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Feb 20, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** ENGINE SWAP : VR38DETT-GT-R-Nismo (Nissan GT-R NISMO '17) Rims "19 - Wing Custom Another Frankenstein SWAP – Superior 700PP Performer Here’s another Frankenstein SWAP car, boasting 700PP with 905HP. Naturally, it’s a superior car on any track, lapping 2:14 on SPA, far ahead of original engine 700PP cars, which manage around 2:17. Beyond its raw power, it offers superior grip and handling. You can race it against other SWAP cars like the Subaru Impreza GrB Road Car SWAP, or the BRZ and 86GT '15. These cars likely deserve their own classification, as they perform closer to 750PP in reality. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Subaru WRX Gr.B Road Car - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.55
Feb 20, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** ENGINE SWAP : CTR38-CTR3 Rims "20 - Wing Custom A top-performance car, competing closely with the Mitsubishi GrB road car in the same class. In my opinion, the Mitsubishi has a better engine and is slightly faster. There are many PP bugs affecting the setup, where even a single click on ballast or downforce can change the car’s performance. Please set these parameters exactly as specified. Suspension settings do not affect PP, so you can adjust them freely. Overall, this car is grippy, stable, fast, and easy to drive on any track. Have a good drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°

Subaru WRX GrB Rally Car - 4WD - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 19, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ***** A highly performant 600PP car, perfect for Nordschleife or any technical, grip-oriented track. It delivers top-tier performance on Nordschleife, making it easy to drive fast, with tons of grip and great precision at the wheel, allowing you to place the car exactly where you want. A truly rewarding driving experience. I’ve found the ideal setup for this car and created three variations based on the same foundation: 600PP Tokyo (Sport Hard)600PP Nordschleife & other tracks (Sport Medium)700PP All-Track Setup This car is incredibly rewarding to drive. Initially, I wasn’t a fan of this type of car, but after a request, I worked to find the right balance, and what a surprise! It delivers one of the best driving sensations in the game, and the performance is outstanding. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

700PPFerrariMR
Abarth 500 '09 - FF - 550PP - Sport Hard - All Track - 1.55
Feb 18, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Wide bodyRims 16" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront A - Side St - Wing AThis is my fastest 550PP car at the moment, lapping close to 7:35. To be fast with this car, you need to be very active with your driving inputs. Use the trail braking technique and point the apex off-throttle to help rotate the rear end. Throttle modulation is crucial to avoid wheel spin caused by the turbo’s peak power delivery. Handling is solid, and performance is excellent, but the driving pleasure isn’t great—at least not to my taste. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

However, with the Z4 GT3 engine, it now has much lower fuel consumption. 700PPBMWFRSWAP
BMW M4 Gr4 - FR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 17, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This car has superior Grip among the Gr4 class, but its top speed is slightly lower than some rivals like the Genesis G70, Aston Martin, Ferrari, and Lexus. For optimal performance, shift just above 7,000 RPM—don’t push it to the full redline, as there’s a power drop beyond that point. It's a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Rims size 13" - Rim Width Wide - Offset Wide Front B - Side B - Rear St - Wing Custom This is a SWAP monster with a huge PP bug—arguably the most famous and feared Frankenstein swap engine under Tokyo’s rainy skies. With its lightweight build and immense power (586HP & 1523 lbs/690 kg), it laps consistently at 1:57 with one stop for tires and gas. Be sure to check your braking points, especially at the end of straights and before the last turn. During bends, avoid staying in high RPMs—shifting earlier is better to maintain control. Porsche Spyder Type 550-1500RS '55 - MR - 550PP - Sport Medium Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 12, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Offset Wide. This is a solid 550PP car with good performance. The gearbox is tuned specifically for the Nürburgring Nordschleife, so adjustments may be needed for slower tracks. You have to shift at very high in the RPM staying in this range of rotation. The car has excellent top speed, and the handling is safe and predictable. However, I had to add some ballast at the front to make it safer to drive fast. It’s a lightweight, reactive car that requires precise driving inputs to get the most out of it. Setup stay almost the same as pre 1.55 , only a few harder springs. The brakes are weak, so careful attention to braking points is essential. Overall, it’s a very fun car to drive. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Toyota Supra RZ '97 - FR - 800PP - Racing Soft Tires - Daytona Road - SWAP - 1.55

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Engine SWAP : M158-AMG-Huayra (Pagani Huayra) Wide BodySize "18 - Rims Width wide - Offset wideFront A - Side A - Rear B - Wing Custom Both the swap and original engine versions were significantly nerfed in the 1.55 update. The swap at 800PP on Daytona is still a fast car, but it’s now 1.5 seconds slower per lap. Previously, its phenomenal top speed and acceleration made it a superior car at this level, but now it’s just a good car. I won’t be creating a 700PP setup for the original engine because, while it’s still enjoyable to drive, it’s much slower than before. I don’t understand why they made these changes to such a wonderful and iconic car. Enjoy your driv.><((((((°>°°°°

4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide body Egine SWAP : 959.50-959 (Porsche 959 '87)Rims 17" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront St - Side St - Rear A - Wing B This is a performant car for Porsche Cup events. I added a small amount of front ballast to correct the overall balance. Normally, I try to preserve the original Porsche RR drivetrain behavior, but in this case, it didn’t work well, even with extreme suspension settings. The car is easy to drive fast and handles well in a pack, making it suitable for competitive racing. I also tested a 700PP version—it wasn’t bad, but it lacked driving pleasure and felt somewhat tasteless. This setup is working perfectly with original engine. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Audi R8 LMS Evo'19 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** I'm going to put a "Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive,><((((((°>°°°°°°

BOPGr3LamborghiniMR
Lancia Delta HF Intregale EVO '91 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Hard Tires - All Track - SWAP - 1.55
Feb 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****Engine SWAP : VR38DETT-GT-R-Nismo (Nissan GT-R NISMO '17) -Wide body- Size "15 / Rims width wide / Offset wide-Front B - Side St - Rear A - Wing A Excellent car. It has good rotation on its short wheelbase, like most rally-oriented cars in this game. It’s not difficult to handle, but you need to be mindful of the rotation during successive direction changes under braking. At that point, the inertia can overwhelm the rear grip. It can also be a good option if you want to induce a smooth drift out of slow corners—on Tsukuba, for example, it’s very fun to do. However, if you push this induced movement too far, you can quickly lose control and go off the track. Beyond that, it’s a highly performant car, offering excellent grip, speed, and great rotation. It’s perfect for technical, twisty tracks or even Nordschleife. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD700PPLanciaSWAP
McLaren P1 GTR '16 - MR - 800PP - Racing Soft tires - All track - 1.55
Feb 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** The 1.55 update didn’t bring many changes to this car. I focused on adding a bit more front grip and addressing the frustrating mechanical understeer it suffered from during low-speed turns. These tweaks improved its handling, making it feel more responsive and predictable in tight corners. You also have to set Racing medium tires adding few more power for speed tracks. Overall, it’s a good, safe car with solid performance. While it’s not exceptional, it’s consistent and reliable, clocking a 2:08 high on SPA. This makes it a great option for drivers who value stability and control over raw speed. Rnjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (C3) '69 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Tokyo Event - 1.55
Feb 11, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "17 - Rims Wide - Offset wide-Front Standard - Wing Standard For this wonderful replica livery, I used an excellent design by "admoquin" and made a few modifications, such as adjusting the number and some smaller stickers. I’m not a big fan of the racing muffler color, but since this is a racing car replica, I left it as is. It’s similar to the convertible model, with more or less the same settings, but this car has a significant PP bug. You can carry almost 650HP, but the downside is that you can’t lower the PP enough to use Sport Soft tires for tracks like Nordschleife. Adjustments to weight, ECU, limiter, or brakes don’t help either. That said, this car has superior grip and can still be used on technical tracks. The main challenge is managing wheel spin out of slow and medium corners. The easiest way to handle the monster power is to upshift at lower RPMs when exiting these corners—the torque will help maintain control. Similarly, you can downshift at higher RPMs to hit the apex if you’re running late. However, the best approach is to flow through bends at low to mid RPMs, letting the car settle on its suspension to find the best line and grip. If needed, you can use traction control for added stability. It’s an amazing car—very fast, of course—lapping at 2:04 while cruising and reaching a top speed of around 330 km/h (205 mph). Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPChevroletFRTokyo
Chevrolet Corvette Convertible (C3) '69 - FR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "15 - Rims Wide - Offset wide-Front Standard - Wing Standard I’ve tried to build this car as close to the original model as possible, avoiding a front splitter or wings. I only added a wide body for stability, a manual custom gearbox, and racing pads (but no racing brakes). This allowed me to focus on adding extra power while keeping the car balanced. It’s fast with a superior grip with the Soft tires . . The car laps at 7:10 in my hands on Nordschleife . It's ok for any other technical track. For Tokyo use the other setup.Handling is excelent . I absolutely love this car. You can choose any muffler you prefer when you drive cockpit view and adjust the PP in other ways to suit your needs. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Chevrolet Corvette Convertible (C3) '69 - FR - 600PP - Sport Medium Tires - Tokyo Event - 1.55
Feb 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "15 - Rims Wide - Offset wide-Front Standard - Wing Standard I’ve tried to build this car as close to the original model as possible, avoiding a front splitter or wings. I only added a wide body for stability, a manual custom gearbox, and racing pads (but no racing brakes). This allowed me to focus on adding extra power while keeping the car balanced. It’s incredibly fast with excellent grip, especially on medium tires at Tokyo. I focused on enhancing grip where possible without relying on aerodynamic parts. The car laps at 2:09 in my hands for 8 laps. It’s a perfect drive with massive front grip—just maintain the fast line with smooth inputs to maximize speed. I absolutely love this car. You can choose any muffler you prefer when you drive cockpit view and adjust the PP in other ways to suit your needs. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
600PPChevroletFRTokyo
Subaru WRX STI I.O.Man '16 - 4WD - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP ****- Size "18 Agile and Grippy, but Lacking Top Speed This car is incredibly agile, with immense grip, and it responds precisely to acceleration, braking, and steering inputs. It’s an absolute pleasure to drive but can become technical and wild if overdriven. Due to its high rotation, overly aggressive or late inputs can amplify its movements. Unlike some 4WD cars that have limits to curb this behavior, this car doesn’t, though you’d have to push it very hard for this to happen. The only real downside is its top speed. Despite having over 600 HP, other strong 700PP cars easily overtake it on straights. However, it’s perfect for tracks like Tsukuba, where a shorter gearbox shines, or any technical, slower circuit. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°
4WD700PPNordschleifeSubaru
Alfa Romeo 4C Gr4 - MR - BOP - Racing Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 10, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** This was a hard car to set up. It’s light with relatively low power compared to other Gr4 cars. If you want both top speed and grip, you need to manage the downforce carefully. Too much downforce, and you’ll sacrifice top speed. Too little, and this light car will jump and land awkwardly, upsetting the chassis and making it very hard to control. I’ve found the right balance of grip and speed, resulting in a car with superior handling that remains easy to drive for most skill levels. That said, it’s still a technical car to handle, slightly more so than others in its class. To sum it up, it’s no boat—it’s precise, balanced, and rewarding to drive. It's a "Gr4 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°

Ford Mustang Boss 429 '69 - FR - 600PP - Sport Soft Tires - Tokyo rain -1.55
Feb 10, 2025
5 STARS CAR SETUP ****** Wide body car.Rims size 16" - Rim Width Wide - Offset WideFront B - Rear St - Wing AThis is one of the best options for the Tokyo rain event. I can lap at 2:00 with it, but you’ll likely cruise around 2:01 (in my hands). Be smooth—the tires can handle 6 laps, but avoid being too aggressive. It’s better to focus on finding the fastest racing line. You can go for 6 laps straight or opt for 1 stop for gas and tires. Either way, it’s a perfect drive with plenty of grip and tons of driving pleasure. This car is truly fantastic. I’ve added a small wing for aesthetics, complementing the beautiful livery by "Bobby-Vegas"—congratulations to him! If you prefer, you can use a custom wing with the maximum downforce level of 200. Just add 38 kg of ballast to bring it back to 600PP, keeping all the other settings the same.                                                                 This race wasn't the last final setup i did. I think it' can be faster for total time. Clean race bonus. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°

Feb 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** The new 1.55 BOP brings a lighter car, but the setup remains largely the same with the basic suspension. I’ve only adjusted the downforce, using a lower setting since the reduced weight increases grip, and the lower downforce is sufficient. The gain in speed compensates well on tracks like SPA, where it’s about half a second faster compared to the previous BOP."Gr3 BOP" section in the "collections" close to "Home Page" button. They'll race under BOP rules , only weight and power , but with full open settings. BOP is the only way to have a similar performance for all Gr3 cars race fairly. Suspension , Differential , Downforce , Gearbox , brake balance only will be tunable. You can adapt your car for a specific track setting your transmission and downforce only. For example , this car on SPA have a better performance with downforce setted Front 400 rear 500 to favor top speed. Downforce setting need to be setted same value front and rear to keep the good balance. Suspension , Differential are ok for any kind of track. Enjoy your drive. ><((((((°>°°°°°°°
BOPFRGr3Lexus
Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (C3) '69 - FR - 700PP - Racing Medium Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** -Wide body-Size "17 - Rims Wide - Offset wide-Front A - Wing Custom This car has a completely new tune for 1.55—no more ballast, a lighter build, improved brakes, plenty of power, and incredible speed. I’ve also added Racing Medium tires to provide extra grip and keep this monster under control. I use longer 1st and 2nd gear ratios to help put the power and torque to the ground without spinning the rear wheels. The performance is excellent, lapping in the low 2:17s at SPA. It’s also well-suited for Nordschleife, taking advantage of its amazing top speed and grip. However, you need to flow with this car; aggressive driving doesn’t work well on that track. For Le Mans you'll not do 3 laps even using fuel mode at 6, short shifting. Perhaps using Racing Soft with a lower power and a better gas consumption. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
700PPChevroletFR
Suzuki Swift Sport '17 - FF - 500PP - Sport Hard Tires - All Track - 1.55
Feb 9, 2025
4 STARS CAR SETUP **** Wide Body Rims 17" - Width Wide Front A - Wing B This car could easily earn 5 stars if its performance matched the very top 500PP road cars, but while it has good top speed, it’s not quite enough to compete with the best. However, in every other aspect, it stands out. Grip and handling are exceptional, making it perfect for tracks like Nordschleife, Eiger, Tsukuba, and Brands Hatch. This car thrives on technical tracks, responding perfectly to every driving input. I initially tried setting it up for 550PP, but a bit of wheel spin prevented it from showing its full potential. Despite this, I absolutely love this car—it’s a joy to drive and a standout in its category. Enjoy your drive. ><(((((((°>°°°°°°
